Description:
The Rat NYC is a 501(c)3 nonprofit arts venue that provides accessible and affordable space for independent artists in New York City.

Our mission is to empower artists from all disciplines by offering a welcoming, creative environment where they can experiment, develop, and present new work. Recognizing the unique challenges that NYC artists face—particularly around space and resources—The Rat NYC exists to fill that gap, creating a haven for artistic exploration that is both affordable and inclusive.

We believe that art thrives in community, and we are committed to fostering meaningful connections between artists, audiences, and our DUMBO neighbors. Our space is more than a venue; it’s a vibrant third space—a gathering place where people can come together, share ideas, and be inspired. Through diverse programming, collaborative projects, and a steadfast commitment to inclusivity, The Rat NYC strives to strengthen the cultural fabric of our city while supporting artists whose voices deserve to be heard.

Our goal is not only to support the creation of art but to cultivate a supportive community, ensuring that NYC remains a home for artists of all backgrounds and perspectives to thrive.

Shaolin Temple Poland (波兰少林寺) jest oficjalnym przedstawicielem Klasztoru Shaolin Yunnan w Polsce, działającym w formie Spółki Shaolin Temple Poland sp. z o.o., wpisaną do KRS za numerem 0000999895. Pieczę nad sprawnym funkcjonowaniem Klasztoru Shaolin Polska sprawuje Shifu Shi Yanbei. Zajęcia prowadzi Shifu Shi Hengyi (释恒毅), Mnich-Wojownik Shaolin 35. generacji.

Trening w Klasztorze Shaolin Polska obejmuje nie tylko sztuki walki, ale całą kulturę Shaolin, która składa się z trzech skarbów: 禅, chán (filozofii buddyjskiej), 武 wǔ (sztuk walki), oraz 医, yī (tradycyjnej medycyny chińskiej/qìgōng). 

W Shaolin Temple Poland wiemy, jak ważna jest równowaga pomiędzy yīn i yáng, dlatego praktykujemy również: qìgōng, méihuāquán oraz tàijí – zgodnie z naukami i praktykami stosowanymi w klasztorze Shaolin w Chinach.

Name: Trailing Around Asia
Description:
Welcome to Trailing Around Asia! My name is Harriet Gaywood. This is my platform where I share all my updates about trail running and running ultra-marathons. You will find photos, instagram updates, published articles about running and order my new book "Trailing Around Asia: Mud, Sweat & Bears" which will be available on Amazon on December 18, 2024.

From the mountains to the sea, exploring Asia through trail-running offers a unique way to see the region. I share my experiences of running ultra-marathons as an average runner who gets to her destination through perseverance.

Having started running in my forties, trail running has become a passion. Born in the UK, I have spent more than half of my life living in China working in the field of public relations and raising two children. In 2024 alone I have run over 1500 km of trail-races and climbed over 70,000m, more than nine times the height of Everest.

Trail-running can be tough battling against the elements and ultimately yourself. By sharing my experience as a trail runner, not as a race-winner but as a champion of achieving my goals I aim to inspire other people to get out on trails and push themselves a little further than they might think is possible.

Name: The Diamond Classic
Description:
The Diamond Classic is the most unique incentive out there, it is truly for everyone, The Diamond Classic idea came from struggling to choose to breed to stallions in incentives or to breed to what we liked most, we understand not everyone can afford to pay to be in every incentive and thats why we are the most unique incentive out there. so what is The Diamond CThe Diamond Classic is two things, it has 50 stallion station slots and 100 farm based slots. we aren't doing it the old way with a single stallion incentive.

It means that ONE a Stallion Station can pay to own a slot...just like all the other regular incentive slots, but with ours everyone of the stallions they stand their foals are eligible to run at Diamond Classic Races.
the SECOND type of Slot is a farm slot, which is just that your entire farm is eligible, if you own multiple, stallions, mares, geldings, purchase new horses they all are eligible to run at Diamond Classic Races.

A Stallion Station that owns a slot can use that to market to stand more stallion's that may not want or be able to afford a farm slot but still have their offspring eligible, this will help to keep diversity in our genetics and open up opportunities to continue to grow the industry and their business.
The benefits of a farm slot are for breeding farms in the business that own multiple stallions mares or geldings. This way you can enroll your entire farm, and you can breed to your own stallions, or choose to buy or breed to others and keep your operation growing and you will no longer need to pay for someone else's slot to add stallions or only breed to certain stallions to be in an incentive and your farm will still have the opportunity to run at a lot of money.

Nuestra forma de trabajar nos hace únicos, no trabajamos según las modas o las tendencias, creemos que las producciones artísticas tienen un valor por sí mismas y poner en alza ese valor hace que podamos ofrecer en todas nuestras producciones escénicas y audiovisuales una experiencia memorable que remueva a nuestros espectadores.

CulturARTS se basa en la creación, en la producción y en la programación. CulturArts se compone de AnimARTS, fundada en 2014 y que se dedica a la producción propia y original de espectáculos; MediARTS, que gestiona, crea y produce formatos para cine, televisión y publicidad; y ARTScreative, la plataforma de producción externa y distribución de espectáculos y eventos culturales. Aunque sus objetivos puedan parecer distintos AnimARTS, MediARTS y ARTScreative se retroalimentan y crean un ecosistema cultural perfecto donde el arte nos hace más libres.

Name: Life's a Pitch Projects
Description:
Life’s a Pitch Projects (LAPP) was founded by Alistair Charles Wilkinson to embed long-term, artist-led cultural infrastructure into football. LAPP utilises football’s creative power, working sensitively and dynamically to explore how the game of our lives connects us all, generating co-created artistic and social responses to the sport, in collaboration with clubs, players, fans and community groups at all professional and grassroots levels. As the first ever Creative Lead at the National Football Museum, Alistair worked on major campaigns, national partnerships, and heritage commissions that proved football’s unique power as a cultural force.

While football holds deep emotional power and global reach, it’s often dismissed by arts spaces as lacking “cultural value” – and in turn, artistic projects in football contexts can be met with suspicion or tokenism. Working at this intersection, we’re frequently asked: “Is this really art?” or “What’s the point?” Rather than seeing this as a barrier, we see it as an opportunity for bridge-building. We create work that speaks fluently to both cultures – centered on care, lived experience, and co-creation – telling stories that matter, where people see themselves reflected. It’s about showing that football *is* culture – and that the stories it holds can transform how we think about belonging, creativity, and power.

Name: Taktikus Combat
Description:
Nos consideramos estudiantes, practicantes e investigadores de las artes marciales y sus formas de enseñar y transmitir. Liderados por Ariel Pérez, un devoto de las artes marciales, con un espíritu curioso e inconformista con los métodos de enseñanza, que lo ha llevado a estudiar e investigar las diferentes metodologías de transmitir y enseñar las artes marciales. Durante más de 20 años viaja de forma regular a Japón, lo que lo ha permitido conocer y entender de primera mano, la forma tradicional de enseñar artes marciales en Japón, y la idiosincrasia de esta cultura de cómo entienden las artes marciales y sus diferencias con el occidente. En el 2022, debido a una fuerte crisis internacional, lo motiva a replantearse su camino marcial y darle un giro radical a cómo enseñar las artes marciales. Así, en un bar de barrio de un pueblo llamado Sabadell en Barcelona, surge su primer borrador de lo que sería Taktikus Combat junto a un pequeño grupo de estudiantes de su escuela.  
Aunque podemos señalar el 2022 como el inicio de lo que hoy conocemos como Taktikus Combat, no nace de la noche a la mañana, en realidad es tan sólo un hito consecuencia de diferentes crisis que se manifestaron en diferentes épocas de la carrera marcial de Ariel Pérez.  Cada una de estas crisis, lo han llevado a dar un paso más en su investigación de cómo planificar y enseñar las artes marciales, junto con otras áreas de conocimientos y especialidades científicas que le dan su visión particular y holística de la enseñanza de la artes marciales.

Name: Performance Brainspotting
Description:
Performance Brainspotting: Unlocking Peak Performance Through the Mind-Body Connection
Empowering Athletes to Thrive: A Revolutionary Approach to Sports Psychology

Performance Brainspotting isn't just another sports psychology practice. We specialize in a groundbreaking technique called Brainspotting, designed to unearth and address the hidden mental obstacles that hold athletes back from achieving their full potential.

The Athlete's Journey: Beyond Technique and Training

The world of competitive sports is demanding. Athletes dedicate countless hours to physical training, perfecting technique, and pushing their bodies to the limit. Yet, even the most dedicated individuals can encounter persistent slumps, debilitating anxiety, and unexplained performance issues. These "mental blocks" often defy traditional approaches focused solely on technique adjustments or increased training.

The Power of Brainspotting: Unearthing Hidden Traumas

Brainspotting (BSP) offers a powerful and innovative solution. It delves deeper, targeting the subconscious mind and body where hidden traumas can reside. These past experiences, both conscious and unconscious, can manifest as anxiety, muscle tension, and performance blocks.

Here's how Performance Brainspotting can help you:

Break Free From Performance Blocks: Overcome the "yips," unexplained loss of skill, and persistent performance issues.
Reduce Anxiety: Tame pre-game jitters, manage performance anxiety, and stop post-game rumination.
Release Muscle Tension: Overcome physical tightness and improve body awareness, enhancing overall performance.
Boost Confidence and Resilience: Develop a rock-solid belief in your abilities and overcome self-doubt.
Improve Mental Focus and Concentration: Sharpen your mental edge, eliminate distractions, and stay present in the moment.
Develop Effective Coping Mechanisms: Learn powerful tools to manage stress and anxiety effectively.

Name: Accademia d'Armi Musumeci Greco 1878
Description:
L’Accademia d’Armi Musumeci Greco, fondata nel 1878 a Roma, con
sede storica in via del Seminario 87 (Pantheon), più altre due sedi
sempre a Roma, una nel quartiere Prati e una nel Museo Nazionale
Romano - Terme di Diocleziano, è un’accademia di Scherma che offre corsi a esperti e principianti, dai 5 anni in su, senza limiti di età. La famiglia dalla quale prende il nome, Musumeci Greco, è la più antica famiglia di schermidori del mondo. Nel 2015 l’Accademia è stata eletta Casa Museo dalla Regione Lazio, unica al mondo in cui si pratichi una disciplina sportiva, e nel 2024 è stata inserita tra le Eccellenze Italiane (non solo dello Sport) dal Ministero delle Imprese e del Made in Italy.

Oltre ad aver conseguito numerosi importanti titoli (Coppe del Mondo, Mondiali, Europei, Nazionali, ecc.), annovera fra i suoi successi anche partecipazioni alle Paralimpiadi di Rio 2016, un podio sfiorato a quelle di Tokyo 2020 e un bronzo a quelle di Parigi 2024. L’Accademia offre corsi di Scherma gratuiti a tutte le persone con disabilità mentali e fisiche, compresi i non vedenti, fin dal 2011, grazie al progetto “Scherma Senza Limiti”. L’Accademia è inoltre presente nel Mondo dello Spettacolo dal 1913, con la generazione dei Maestri d’Armi, Enzo Musumeci Greco prima e Renzo Musumeci Greco poi, l’attuale Presidente dell’Accademia. Enzo e Renzo hanno collaborato con nomi celebri del cinema hoolywoodiano, europeo e italiano (William Wyler, Tony e Ridley Scott, Alessio Boni, Alessandro Benvenuti, Monica Bellucci, Massimo Popolizio, Orson Welles, Kim Rossi Stuart, Luchino Visconti, Valerio Zurlini, Franco Zeffirelli, e moltissimi altri), portando la loro arte anche nel mondo del Teatro, della Televisione, dell’Opera Lirica e delle ricostruzioni storiche.

Name: Towarzystwo Aktywnej Komunikacji
Description:
Działania TAK ogniskują się wokół dziedzin takich jak literatura, sztuki wizualne i media elektroniczne. Od roku 2011 Towarzystwo koncentruje się na rozwoju projektów o charakterze międzynarodowym; korzystając ze środków pozyskanych z kilkunastu instytucji zagranicznych zorganizowaliśmy działania promujące nowe spojrzenie na polską kulturę m.in. w Niemczech, Czechach, Norwegii, Liechtensteinie, na Węgrzech, we Francji, na Słowacji czy na Islandii. Uruchomiliśmy także szeroko zakrojony projekt artystyczny i społeczny pod nazwą Pracownia Opowieści, który stanowi ważny punkt w programie Europejskiej Stolicy Kultury Wrocław 2016. Przygotowujemy programy telewizyjne, filmy dokumentalne, książki i czasopisma, spektakle teatralne i scenariusze filmowe.

Największym wydarzeniem artystycznym organizowanym przez TAK pozostaje Międzynarodowy Festiwal Opowiadania – wielowymiarowe święto krótkiej prozy, poświęcone promocji ambitnej książki, koncentrujące się na niebanalnej prezentacji form narracyjnych, badaniu oddziaływania literatury na inne dziedziny sztuki, prowokujące do interakcji pomiędzy autorami a publicznością, pozwalające na wymianę doświadczeń twórców polskich i zagranicznych. Ten konsekwentnie rozwijany od 2004 roku wrocławski festiwal aktywnie uczestniczy w dyskusjach o przemianach kulturowych i społecznych, podejmuje także próby odtworzenia więzi łączących literaturę z tradycją opowieści ustnej. Centralnym nurtem MFO są prezentacje opowiadań prowadzone przez autorów w językach oryginalnych, w unikalnej oprawie scenograficznej i z symultanicznym tłumaczeniem, czemu towarzyszą spotkania i warsztaty dla dzieci, wystawy, koncerty, pokazy filmowe, konkurs na opowiadanie i tłumaczenie literackie, warsztaty pisarskie.

MFO prowadzi także działalność wydawniczą, której efektem są m.in. antologie tematyczne. Od roku 2006 prezesem Towarzystwa jest Marcin Hamkało.

Name: Polivalente
Description:
O Polivalente começou em 2015 com o time masculino, participamos de muitos campeonatos municipais.
Mais o principal foi a serie prata segunda divisão de futsal tocantinense e na participação conseguirmos ser vice campeões que subimos pra primeira divisão e aí começou nossa trajetória no futsal.
Até o ano de 2019 estávamos apenas com o masculino nas competições federadas e nas competições municipais participávamos com os dois feminino e masculinos. Tivemos vários títulos, porém era competições sem vagas pra nacionais.
Em 2017 entrei no estadual tocantinense feminino pelo Porto esporte clube fizemos uma parceria e fomos campeãs, e logo depois veio a pandemia e tivemos que dá uma parada.
Mais em 2020 voltamos com as atividades, aí ficamos com as competições municipais pois a federação não realizou a competição. 
E em 2021 competimos o feminino e o masculino que ai o feminino ficou vice campeãs e fomos disputar a copa do Brasil.
Mais infelizmente com poucos recursos ficamos na primeira fase.
E o masculino disputou o estadual da primeira divisão e perdeu na semi final.
Sempre com muitos sacrifícios conseguimos levar a equipe nas competições. 
E em 2020 participamos no estadual de campo feminino como Grêmio e perdemos na final ficamos em vice campeãs e mais uma vez o nosso sonho em ir pro brasileiro ficou pra depois.
E no ano de 2022 participamos novamente e por fim como polivalente o time do coração, o time que sempre lutamos e amamos.
E fomos campeãs e agora em 2023 vamos disputar o brasileiro A3 pra representar o nosso estado.

Name: The Warm Up
Description: The Warm Up Taekwondo Championships was conceived with the aim of providing athletes the chance to apply their training beyond the confines of the training ring. The challenge with local or smaller tournaments often lies in the limited opportunities for competition, hindering the learning and growth process. The structure of The Warm Up Taekwondo Championships is designed to address this by ensuring each athlete has a minimum of three chances to showcase their skills in a competitive setting. Our overarching goal is to nurture a pipeline of athletes capable of excelling at the highest levels of major competitions, such as the U.S. Open and National Championships. Drawing from my experience as a former national team member, I understand the pivotal role that experiences outside the training floor played in applying skills successfully in competitions. While learning is crucial, tournaments serve as a platform to apply acquired knowledge, akin to a pop quiz that tests practical understanding. The tournament's scheduling provides athletes with valuable opportunities to compete and compare skill levels, a crucial element often lacking in contemporary Taekwondo competitions. This repeated exposure allows athletes to refine their decision-making skills, make clutch decisions, and ultimately progress towards success. I attribute much of my own success to the practice matches that helped elevate my skill level. . The Warm Up Taekwondo Championships seeks to provide athletes with the necessary opportunities to practice, compete, and propel themselves towards their aspiration of making the national team.

Rebound è un vero e proprio stile di vita!

Promuoviamo la cultura dello sport di strada e lottiamo contro la dispersione scolastica, utilizzando lo sport come strumento educativo e di inclusione.
Rebound Street con tutte le espressioni artistico-culturali della street culture contribuisce a trasformare gli spazi pubblici in luoghi di cittadinanza attiva. 
Rebound Street 2022 e 2023 fa parte del prestigioso circuito internazionale Red Bull Half Court. Una delle squadre partecipanti al campionato StreetBall 3v3, iscritta alla categoria "Rebound Pro Maschile", ha avuto l'eccezionale opportunità di accedere alle finali nazionali della Red bull Half Court. 

Per garantire inclusività e coinvolgimento di è nata la categoria "Rebound Special", rivolta agli atleti e agli appassionati con disabilità fisica e intellettiva. Questa scelta è stata coerente con il principio di integrazione su cui si basa l'intera manifestazione, dimostrando come lo sport possa abbattere le barriere e unire le persone, indipendentemente dalle loro capacità fisiche.

Why Customers Choose Our Studio in New Jersey:

At Pilates Love Studio, we are passionate about transforming lives through Pilates. Here’s what sets us apart as the leading New Jersey Pilates studio:

1. Expert Instructors: Our certified instructors, are dedicated to helping you unlock your full potential. With years of experience, they’ll guide you through dynamic Pilates sessions that build strength, improve flexibility, and enhance your overall well-being.

2. Personalized Approach: We believe that fitness is not one-size-fits-all. That’s why we offer a variety of classes suitable for all fitness levels. Whether you’re a Pilates newbie or a seasoned practitioner, you’ll find the perfect class to meet your needs.

3. State-of-the-Art Facility: Our modern studio, is equipped with the latest Pilates apparatus, creating an inviting atmosphere for your workouts. You’ll have access to top-of-the-line equipment to maximize your Pilates experience.

4. Thriving Community: Join our vibrant Pilates community and connect with like-minded individuals who share your passion for a healthier lifestyle. Our studio fosters a sense of belonging and support, making your fitness journey enjoyable and fulfilling.

5. Convenient Location: We are strategically situated in the heart of New Jersey, making it easy for you to prioritize your well-being. Our studio is easily accessible, allowing you to incorporate Pilates seamlessly into your routine.

Begin your transformative journey at Pilates Love Studio, the premier Pilates studio in New Jersey. Elevate your fitness, renew your energy, and embrace a balanced life. Your path to a healthier, happier you starts here.

Name: Waka Wā Karavan
Description:
Waka Wa Karavan - L'art de transformer vos célébrations en expériences originales, sensibles et joyeuses ! 

Imaginez vos invité·es devenant les protagonistes d'une création artistique en direct, pouvant choisir d'être muse ou d'assister à la magie qui opère… 

L'EXPÉRIENCE PEINTURE EN DIRECT

Pour cellui qui pose : se découvrir sous le regard bienveillant d'une artiste, voir naître son portrait à l'aquarelle, repartir avec une œuvre originale qui capture son essence du moment.
Pour cellui qui observe : assister à la transformation de l'ordinaire en art, voir les visages familiers révélés sous un nouveau jour, partager l'émotion collective de la création.
Le live painting crée une bulle de contemplation au cœur de votre fête. 
* Portraits sensibles (15 min max/feuille)
* Carnet reportage dessiné de vos moments forts : chaque trait raconte cet événement unique.

LA CARAVANE PHOTOBOOTH BOHÈME 
Pour cellui qui entre dans cette photocabine nomade : explorer un univers bohème et chaleureux, jouer avec les accessoires, créer ses propres souvenirs joyeux et partagés. 

Impression directe des photos, capsules vidéos, audiobooth pour capturer voix et rires, table créative pour un livre d'or collaboratif : chaque élément nourrit l'expérience partagée.

LE BONHEUR DES SOUVENIRS À SAVOURER 
Au-delà de l'instant présent, ces créations deviennent des trésors à redécouvrir : l'aquarelle accrochée qui fixe cet instant, les photos feuilletées des années plus tard, les messages audio réécoutés avec émotion.

Notre approche : révéler la beauté authentique de chacun·e, créer des ponts entre les générations, offrir des souvenirs tangibles qui traversent le temps.

 Lieux d'activité : Charente-Maritime (17) | Dordogne (24) | Gironde (33)
(Live-painting : autres départements sur demande)

El nombre “Escondido” refleja su esencia: un lugar donde los espectadores pueden descubrir joyas ocultas del mundo del entretenimiento, como monólogos, magia, improvisación y encuentros únicos, en un ambiente acogedor y exclusivo.

Este teatro busca ser un refugio para aquellos que desean una conexión profunda con los artistas y las actuaciones, lejos del bullicio y la vertiginosidad de la ciudad.

Cada visita al Teatro Escondido Gran Vía es como descubrir un secreto bien guardado de Madrid, un espacio donde la magia y la risa se encuentran en un entorno íntimo y encantador

Hoy en día Asociación de Taekwon-Do Universal, cuenta con un prestigio y reconocimiento nacional e internacional, destacando un gran numero de maestros e instructores que imparten la actividad en los países de Argentina, Bolivia, Peru y Chile, sumado a los grandes logros deportivos en torneos nacionales, panamericanos y mundiales, en la que destacan grandes campeones del mundo.

En Chile, iniciamos el camino de la mano de la Asociación de Taekwon-Do Universal, en septiembre del año 2021, bajo el alero de la supervisión técnica del maestro Fabián Pini, contamos con academias universal en las comunas de Quillota, Iquique correspondientes a regiones y en San Miguel, La Reina y Vitacura, que corresponden a la Región Metropolitana, la familia Universal se distingue por tener una formación integral para sus miembros en cuerpo, alma y espíritu.

Programs of the ASF Foundation
We have awarded $363,000 in academic scholarships, giving the opportunity to Alabama youth to further continue their higher education through a two or four year college university.

Alabama State Games - An Olympic-style event with over 20 different sports encompassing over 2,000 different events with over 6,000 participants.  This is the largest multi-sport event in Alabama for youth and adults of all ages and abilities. Student Ambassadors Program

Name: The GA Foundation
Description:
The GA Foundation is a dedicated nonprofit subsidiary of Garden State Community Collective (GSCC), committed to empowering and uplifting youth through sports, education, and community-building initiatives. Our mission is to provide underprivileged and underserved communities with access to quality sports programs, mentorship opportunities, and resources that foster personal development, teamwork, and leadership skills. By leveraging the power of youth sports, we aim to inspire positive change and create pathways to success both on and off the field.

At The GA Foundation, we believe in the transformative power of sports as a tool for social equity. Our programs are designed to engage youth from all walks of life, promoting inclusivity, discipline, and character development. We work closely with local schools, organizations, and community leaders to ensure that every child, regardless of their background or financial situation, has the opportunity to participate in sports and benefit from the life lessons they provide.

Our work goes beyond athletics—we focus on building well-rounded individuals by offering academic support, mentorship, and career readiness programs that prepare our youth for future success. Whether it’s through organizing youth sports leagues, providing scholarships, or creating community outreach events, The GA Foundation is committed to creating lasting impacts in the lives of the youth we serve.

Through the unwavering support of GSCC, we have expanded our reach and resources, allowing us to offer even more opportunities to the communities we serve. Together, we are not just investing in sports—we are investing in the future of our youth, fostering the next generation of leaders who will drive change in their communities and beyond.

Join us in making a difference. Because when we empower our youth, we empower our future.

The Aurora Sports Hall of Fame is also a place of education, with more than 90 artifacts to showcase how far our inductees have come and a place of community, where young and not so young can gather to share and appreciate Aurora’s rich culture and heritage.

We are located in the Stronach Aurora Recreation Complex (SARC) at 1400 Wellington Street East, Aurora, ON.

Nominate the next individual to be inducted into the Aurora Sports Hall of Fame. Visit https://aurorashof.ca/nomination-process/ to learn more.

Name: I Would be Here If I Could
Description:
Welcome to the largest collaborative art project in the UK co-curated with people with ME/CFS Long COVID 

I Would be Here If I Could… is the journey of a large mirror box and map placing messages from people with ME/CFS, Long COVID and other health conditions, for people at the places they love but are now unable to get to.
Our mission is to enable people to be seen and heard through the shared love, memory, and experience of place; so we all feel connected to that wider sense of belonging.

Lockdown was a realisation of what it is like to be shut inside and cut off from so much of normal everyday life. For over 1.5 million people in the UK who have ME/CFS or Long COVID this a permanent reality. Shut in and shut out they have become invisible.

Started as an invitation to tell us where they would be if they could. The project has received many messages, telling of football grounds, stadiums, beaches, parks. Ordinary and unusual places that mean so much but, as a result of their health, senders are unable or rarely able to get there.
Starting next year the mirrorbox will appear at different places throughout the UK. It may stay for a few minutes and be asked to move on, or it might stay the whole day. At these locations, people can enter the box and listen to the message from the person who has chosen that place. They are invited to reply by writing a postcard back.

We want to amplify the absence of so many and in the process provide a way to connect to the wider community through the shared love and memories of places that are important to us.

We invite you to listen to the many voices, take part, tell others and maybe visit the mirrorbox if you can.  With funding from Arts Council England, this is a project in development so please sign up or follow for updates.

Name: Culture Plus
Description:
Culture Plus est une association qui organise de nombreux évènements musicaux et festifs. Depuis sa création en 2006, elle a pour projet de dynamiser le Var, et plus particulièrement la métropole toulonnaise. Musiques actuelles, musiques du monde, personne n’est mis à l’écart, le partage et la découverte étant les valeurs fondamentales de Culture Plus. L’association est également présente pour les jeunes artistes locaux, en les encourageant et les accompagnant. Et parce que la culture doit être accessible à tous, elle s’engage à proposer des petits prix.

À l’écoute des besoins et des désirs des varois, l’association fait preuve de créativité afin de proposer des événements variés tout au long de l’année sur l’ensemble du département.

L’association Culture Plus organise également chaque année depuis 15 ans maintenant le festival COULEURS URBAINES à La Seyne-sur-Mer. Festival indépendant depuis sa création, il a su rester accessible et toujours animé par des valeurs citoyennes, de partage et de solidarité. Chaque année, le festival évolue en introduisant différents courants de la culture urbaine. Que ce soit par le biais de la musique, de la danse ou des expressions artistiques, il se veut être un événement multidisciplinaire, dont les objectifs principaux sont l’échange et la découverte artistique. Le festival Couleurs Urbaines est dorénavant un événement majeur, incontournable et pérenne au sein de l’agglomération toulonnaise.

1896 Partners partners with investors & operators across the sports & entertainment ecosystem to identify and create new sources of value. We develop structured investment frameworks & processes, source & diligence opportunities, and build commercialization strategies for leagues, teams, & emerging IP. 

*** Our Name ***

1896 was a transformational year for the sports & media industry. 

In addition to the first modern Olympic games, the first live sports broadcast on record occurred when a telegraph line connected from Montreal to Winnipeg delivered near-live play-by-play updates to fans back in Winnipeg during a Stanley Cup challenge series game between the cities’ two ice hockey franchises.

Since 1896, the broadcasting of live sports & entertainment, and how organizations in those industries build and engage fans, has continued to evolve along with technology.

The name ‘1896 Partners' pays homage to the importance of past innovations in creating value for the ecosystem while acknowledging that the next wave of value creation will be borne out of continued innovation.

Name: Maison de la culture de Bellechasse
Description:
HISTORIQUE
La Maison de la Culture de Bellechasse, entreprise fondée en 1995, est un organisme à but non lucratif depuis 1999. Elle intervient sur le territoire afin de répondre à des besoins de formation artistique pour la population de Bellechasse et a un mandat de diffusion des arts de la scène. Elle est gérée par un conseil d'administration et plusieurs bénévoles, organismes ou entreprises s’y investissent afin de permettre à la culture de s’épanouir dans notre région. 

La Maison de la Culture de Bellechasse offre depuis l'automne 2003 des spectacles sur une base régulière. Sa programmation événementielle offre entre 20 et 30 activités annuellement. Spectacle d’artistes connus, de la relève ou artistes de notre région, la programmation tente de joindre un large public tout en offrant une variété permettant à tous d’y trouver un intérêt. 

Depuis avril 2004 le Cinéma de la Maison de la Culture de Bellechasse est membre des Cinémas parallèles et a présenté, dans la même année, sa première programmation de films. Elle présente maintenant deux films par mois de septembre à avril et vise à diffuser le cinéma québécois ou international, des films de répertoire, des documentaires et du cinéma jeune public. 

À la naissance de la Maison de la culture en 1995, les activités étaient majoritairement basées sur la formation artistique. L’école de musique de la Maison de la culture de Bellechasse compte plusieurs professeurs afin d’offrir des cours privés de chant, de piano, de guitare et de violon. De concert avec l’école secondaire de St-Damien, la FADOQ et le Cercle des fermières et le projet Cours de Jouvence développé par Mme Pauline Mercier est née en 2018. Il s’y développe une offre de formation de cours de groupe liés à plusieurs sphères d’activités et c’est la Maison de la culture qui y assume la partie artistique. L’Harmonie de Bellechasse, le chœur de Jouvence, les ateliers de théâtre, la technique de scène, la scénographie et la confection de costumes y sont off

Name: 180 Not Out
Description:
"180 Not Out" is a groundbreaking podcast series that delves deep into the 180-year saga of cricket, capturing the sport's evolution from its colonial beginnings to its present-day glory. Covering a wide spectrum of topics, the podcast explores the transformation of cricket and its profound impact on players, leagues, controversies, commercialization, challenges, coaching, fitness, demographics, formats, records, and the future.

Featuring insights from more than 40 cricket legends, including Gautam Gambhir, Harbhajan Singh, Courtney Walsh, Chris Gayle, and many others, "180 Not Out" contrasts traditional and modern cricket. The series navigates through technological advancements, the rise of leagues, and the challenges faced by players. It delves into the commercialization of the game, controversies within cricket boards, and the evolving demographics of players and fans.

The podcast unfolds in multiple episodes, each focusing on specific aspects of cricket's journey. Topics range from the evolution of leagues and the art of batting and bowling to discussions on the impact of red-ball versus white-ball cricket. The series also explores the role of social media, the transformation of cricket fandom, technological innovations in the game, and the intricate relationship between money and finance in cricket.

"180 Not Out" doesn't shy away from addressing critical issues like corruption, crime, and cricket, providing insights into historical challenges and contemporary dilemmas. It also touches upon the prospects of cricket becoming a global phenomenon, examining the intersection of the Olympics, leagues, and national pride.

In its entirety, "180 Not Out" weaves a comprehensive narrative that balances historical perspectives with contemporary insights. With episodes on coaching, commentary, and life after cricket, the series explores the second leg of a cricketer's career and the role of social media in shaping post-playing lives.

Voor het slagen van inclusie binnen jouw organisatie, is het van belang te zorgen voor een veilige werkomgeving. Wanneer jouw medewerkers zich veilig weten, is er meer ruimte om zich open te stellen voor de ander. Vanuit veiligheid is er ruimte om andere mensen welkom te heten en om begrip te hebben voor uiteenlopende visies en meningen. 

Culture Refined biedt antwoorden en concrete handvaten om bij te dragen aan een inclusieve werkorganisatie, waarbij het zich richt op sociale veiligheid en mentaal welzijn. Wij adviseren en begeleiden bij het creëren, behouden en uitbreiden van een veilige werkomgeving. Dit doen we door bewustwording te creëren en aan de slag te gaan met een aanpak op maat.

Wil jij ook de volgende stap zetten in inclusie en je medewerkers de ruimte en de veiligheid bieden waarin ze zich thuis voelen? Boek dan nu direct een kennismakingsgesprek via de website.

Name: Black Girls Shred
Description:
A social equity centered organization with a mission of increasing the participation of black women athletes in action sport competitions and careers 

We believe that through access, information and opportunity the world of action sports can grow to become more inclusive and intentional spaces for Black athletes. We believe that all people of color have a right to quality of life spaces and if given the right development and support they will become viable competitors, artists and engineers within the action sports industry. 


With our work we are increasing safety practices, informing health, rallying resources, encouraging equity and developing skate spaces for shredders of all style and skill level, this includes skateboarding, roller skating, biking, surfing, figure skating, snowboarding and more…  We are specifically focused on the Black community and their IPOC peers. Everything we do is in collaboration with community, intentionally centering those who identify as WOMEN, LGBTQIA and GNC.

Description:

Active depuis 2014, l’école compte aujourd’hui plus de 400 élèves formés par leurs professeurs et chorégraphes Yacine et Sumirah Zenasni (Mr & Mrs Z), danseurs professionnels et fondateurs de l’école.

Mais la Z-SCHOOL, ce n’est pas seulement une école : nous intervenons également pour vous, lors de vos événements d’entreprise, séminaires, inaugurations, journées d’intégrations, team building ou soirées privées.Forts de notre expérience de la scène et d’un univers urbain dynamique, nous créons des shows sur mesure, des animations, des workshops participatifs et des performances adaptées à votre public et à votre image.

#DanseUrbaine #StreetJazz #HipHop #Breakdance #AnimationEntreprise #TeamBuilding #ShowDanse #Dijon #Beaune

Name: FaithWorx Productions
Description:
FaithWorx Productions is a dynamic multimedia nonprofit specializing in youth development and community engagement through sports, storytelling, and performing arts. Our mission is to inspire, empower, and uplift individuals by harnessing the power of sports, creative expression, and faith-driven values to create opportunities for education, career growth, and social impact.
Additionally, our performing arts initiatives support musicians, dancers, spoken word artists, and filmmakers, offering them media exposure, live performance opportunities, and digital content creation platforms.

FaithWorx Sports 
FaithWorx Sports, a division of FaithWorx Productions, is dedicated to developing and promoting campus sports leagues, live-streamed competitions, and interactive sports media. We provide a platform for student-athletes, volunteers, and media content creators to showcase their talents while gaining real-world experience in sports management, event marketing, and digital production.

Core Capabilities
1. Live Sports Broadcasting & Multimedia Production
2. Youth Development & Creative Skills Training
3. Performing Arts & Digital Storytelling
4. Faith & Community Engagement

Through sports, media, and performing arts, FaithWorx Productions is empowering people, inspiring faith, and transforming lives—equipping the next generation of athletes, creatives, and leaders with skills, exposure, and opportunities that go beyond the game and the stage.

Name: Fédération de Karaté Traditionnel Budo France
Description:
La Fédération de Karaté Traditionnel Budo France (FKT Budo France), fondée en 1984, est l’organisation officielle en France représentant le karaté traditionnel. Elle est affiliée à l’ITKF (International Traditional Karate Federation) et à l’ETKF (European Traditional Karate Federation), garantissant une pratique fidèle à la tradition et reconnue au niveau international. Son action repose sur la philosophie du Budo, qui considère les arts martiaux non seulement comme une discipline physique, mais aussi comme une voie d’éducation et de développement personnel. Ainsi, la pratique du karaté traditionnel vise à cultiver la maîtrise de soi, la confiance, la patience, le respect, l’humilité et la résilience, autant de valeurs universelles qui dépassent le cadre sportif.

La fédération organise de nombreux événements : stages techniques, séminaires de formation, compétitions nationales et internationales, ainsi que la préparation des équipes de France qui participent aux rencontres européennes et mondiales. Elle assure également la formation et la qualification des instructeurs, arbitres et responsables de clubs, afin de garantir un enseignement rigoureux et respectueux de la déontologie martiale.

Name: Lisburn Distillery Football Club
Description: LISBURN DISTILLERY FOOTBALL + ATHLETIC CLUB LIMITED is a Football Club based out of NEW GROSVENOR STADIUM, Lambeg, Lisburn, United Kingdom.

Name: League On Wheels
Description:
League On Wheels is the brainchild of Andy Walker and Tom Oates.

During his time setting up Batley Bulldogs Wheelchair Rugby League team, Andy found gathering information about the sport a difficult task.  Governing body information was minor and often not up to date, and  many current clubs and foundations were doing great with their social media presence, but, understandably, the resources that many of their parent clubs used were unavailable to their wheelchair set-ups.

Wheelchair Rugby League is such an exciting, dynamic and inclusive sport that it deserves all the promotion it gets..that is where League On Wheels comes in.

Working with the RFL, clubs, players and administrators, League On Wheels has pulled together a community who will work their fingers to the bone to highlight everything positive about WhRL, using it's popular podcast and social media platforms.  

League On Wheels is self-funded by the founders, and has recently started to sell branded merchandise for the upkeep of the project, and to help fund future events.

We are always looking for sponsors to partner with us to carry on our, so far, successful run, so if your business would like to align itself with our wonderful little part of Wheelchair Rugby League, please do reach out.

Name: The EMPowerplay Project
Description:
The EMPowerplay Project Partners facilitate the donation and implementation of multi-use sports and arts related facilities including its state-of-the-art hockey rinks, and the integrated support system, to ensure program sustainability to towns, cities, inner-cities and private-public partnerships, across North America. This initiative enables the introduction of the great sport to millions of kids (and adults) who for whatever reason, never had the opportunity to try the sport before. In doing so, the initiative also creates sustainable and profitable businesses that ultimately support and empower the communities they serve.

Amongst EMPowerplay’s goals, the mission for inclusivity remains a major focus. For EMP, it’s not about finding the next Gretzky, Crosby or McDavid, but to mentor and help develop the next greatest character driven human beings and possibly even leaders. 

Bottom line - it’s all about access. Create it for those either unaware it exists or no means to get it, and you’ve got a recipe for success.

EMPowerplay, in an effort to continue to build upon its industry leading connectivity platform, partners with many of the echelon of the sport including USABH, the NBHL to further the collective goal and help standardize the sport by creating a true growth of the game initiative.

However, make no mistake – it doesn’t stop there.  After all, this isn’t the "field of dreams" and just because EMP donates, builds and implements rinks Nationwide, doesn’t mean folks just show up. You still need to "go out and get them", and create opportunity and sustainability through a Nationwide resource and support system and all of that can be found through The EMPowerplay Project, and the Initiative’s Partner Program.

Name: HuviGG Esports
Description:
We are a competition and educational E Sports Arena located in the Oviedo Mall and the Seminole Town Center.  We offer the best in gaming with RTX-3090 gaming PC’s and a competition Virtual Reality Laser Tag Arena which is also great for corporate fund raising and team building.  We offer league and tournament play for most all of the popular games on the market.    

HuviGG E Sports is currently working with local schools and school officials to become the first credited e sports arena for middle schools and high school e sports teams in Central Florida.   Due to our machines, schools are now able to build an e sports team and compete with other schools in the area to be able to advance their careers in computer technology.    We offer coaching in e sports and gaming, coding, development classes as an educational arm to our e sports arena. 

Connect you companies brand to your local middle school or high school and help promote e sports in Central Florida.  Your support will go to team jerseys for each schools e sports team and for gaming and practice sessions.    Each game will be lived streamed to give your companies brand maximum reach.  

Come join HuviGG and the E Sports and Gaming surge in Central Florida and around the World and help us make Central Florida the destination for e sports tournaments.

Name: Hammerlock Pure Wrestling
Description:
Hammerlock Pure Wrestling was developed to celebrate the long-established local professional wrestling scene while stressing athletic, competitive pro wrestling, with a classic good versus evil approach. We will be a throwback of sorts with a nod to an old school appeal for local crowds, while not insulting the intelligence of the dedicated local fan base.

Hammerlock Pure Wrestling believes in providing a family-friendly environment and spectacle, while maintaining an affordable experience for families and fans of all ages. No over the top violence, language or raunchy and questionable scenarios for parents to worry about.

Hammerlock Pure Wrestling supports all our athletes and fans, regardless of sexual orientation, race, gender, religion or ethnicity. We expect our athletes and fans who attend and participate in our wrestling events to respect each other and enjoy the experience in a responsible manner. 

Hammerlock Pure Wrestling works closely with all venues to follow their existing policies and codes of conduct, while maintaining our core beliefs of keeping a safe, inclusive, and respectful environment.

Anyone who conducts themselves in a manner that is offensive or disrespectful to the wrestlers or other fans will be subject to removal from the venue at the discretion of Hammerlock Wrestling personnel. Together we can foster and grow an experience that is respectful for everyone attending and growing the fan base of professional wrestling.

Name: Daki Ling
Description:
Le 𝗗𝗔𝗞𝗜 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗚 est une salle de spectacle Marseillaise.

Sa direction artistique est principalement orientée vers le 𝗰𝗹𝗼𝘄𝗻 autour de plusieurs activités :
· Diffusion de spectacles
· Accueil en résidence d'artistes
· Formations amateurs et professionnelles
· Location de la salle pour diverses manifestations (réunions, expositions, répétitions de spectacle de fin d'année d'école, séminaires, conférences, évènements privés...)

Créée en 2001, le Daki Ling, affilié à l'association 𝗖𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗭𝗲𝗻 𝗖𝗮𝗳𝗲, est pourtant un lieu bien plus ancien que ça. Du 13e siècle pour être précis.
Cette salle possède un cachet un nique, de par ses voûtes d'époques et sa localisation : en plein cœur de Marseille, 1er arrondissement.

Le Daki Ling est aussi le QG de la troupe d'improvisation théâtrale du 𝗠𝗜𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗱𝗲 𝗠𝗮𝗿𝘀𝗲𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗲, qui s'y entraîne et y performe devant des spectateurs depuis plus de 15 ans.

Temps fort de chaque saison du Daki Ling, le mois de mai est synonyme de fête et de forte période d'activité, de par le festival 𝗧𝗘𝗡𝗗𝗔𝗡𝗖𝗘 𝗖𝗟𝗢𝗪𝗡, organisé chaque année dans la ville de Marseille, et proposant en ville une majorité de spectacles gratuits, toujours axés autour du 𝗰𝗹𝗼𝘄𝗻, du 𝗰𝗶𝗿𝗾𝘂𝗲, et des 𝗮𝗿𝘁𝘀 𝗱𝗲 𝗿𝘂𝗲.

Name: Gravity9
Description:
GESANG*THEATER*COACHING

Wir sind dein inspirierendes Gesangs- und Theater- Studio im Kreis 9. Wir leben täglich unsere Leidenschaft für Musik, Tanz und Performance und connecten durch unser Angebot mit dir und unserer Community!

In Einzelstunden, Kursen, Workshops oder Konzerten kannst du deine Skills aufbauen, schärfen und nach Herzens Lust einsetzen. 

Ob junge Talente, leidenschaftliche Profis oder engagierte Amateure – sie finden alle bei uns ihren Platz. Trainieren*Dranbleiben*Weiterentwickeln und erleben, was es heisst, frei in deinem Ausdruck zu sein.

Coaching für Amateur Impro- oder Theatergruppen: Jede Form der Entwicklung ist eng mit deiner Persönlichkeit verbunden. Unsere Arbeit ermöglicht es, dir tiefere Einblicke in deine inneren Verhaltensmuster und Gewohnheiten zu geben und so den Schlüssel zur Veränderung zu entdecken.

Steh dir nicht selber im Weg, denn: es ist alles nur im Kopf! Gesangs- Performance- & Schauspiel- Arbeit ist ein sehr natürlicher und effektiver Weg, um deine persönlichen Antworten für dauerhafte Ergebnisse zu finden. 

Was ist das Richtige für dich? Check unsere Website oder schreib uns!

Name: Compagnie 4 à Corps
Description:
La Compagnie 4 à Corps est une association artistique dont les projets s’articulent autour de la création de spectacles de danse contemporaine encordée et la transmission de la danse contemporaine et des techniques encordées. Elle a été créée en 2007 et se situe actuellement à La Roche sur Yon.
Mené par Nathalie Retailleau et Emilie Vin, le projet chorégraphique de 4 à Corps ne cesse de se diversifier autour d'une écriture ouverte aux autres arts, musique, cirque, théâtre et ce en direction d'un public familial.
Depuis 2011, nous revendiquons une écriture pour l'espace extérieur, la rue, les jardins... Une gestuelle propre au sol dur et à l'espace infini comme moteur de notre propos artistique.
En 2014 nous découvrons la danse escalade, cela nous ouvre un vaste espace de jeu avec la gravité. Nous nous formons, nous nous entourons d'anges gardiens et en 2018 notre première pièce dans un arbre voit le jour.
Depuis nous ne cessons de mettre en lien nos valeurs à travers des activités artistiques et pédagogiques autour de la danse dans les arbres et de la danse contemporaine encordée. Ce terme définit notre style, la danse contemporaine encordée s’appuie sur les techniques de danse-escalade, danse verticale et  danse voltige qui se pratiquent avec des baudriers et des cordes. Cette danse allie acrobatie technique et poésie du geste chorégraphique. Nous partons du sol, des fondamentaux de la danse contemporaine pour aller vers une exploration de l'élévation, du déséquilibre grâce à l’agrès. 
Notre écriture chorégraphique fait également la part belle à une danse ludique qui s’adresse au jeune spectateur et à un public familial. Malice et humour ponctuent nos gestes. Notre danse reflète également la complicité de notre longue amitié, ciment de 4 à Corps. 
Notre champ artistique se développe autour de la nature notamment avec la danse dans les arbres que nous explorons dans notre écriture chorégraphique ainsi que dans notre approche pédagogique.

Tapioca est un bureau d’accompagnement d’artistes au cœur de la création contemporaine dans le spectacle vivant. Notre équipe s’appuie sur ses compétences de production, de diffusion et de communication pour apporter un soutien stratégique complet aux artistes.

Notre connaissance du secteur et des réseaux du spectacle vivant nous permet d’ajuster nos méthodes de travail et de créer une collaboration sur mesure.

-- Formations --
Conscients que le développement de projets artistiques ne peut se faire sans un savoir-faire professionnel et un accompagnement adapté, Tapioca propose des formations sur-mesure en immersion professionnelle totale. Cette « Expérience de terrain » offre la possibilité à un artiste de consolider son projet au travers de méthodes et d’outils adaptés.
Tapioca est certifié Qualiopi

-- Artisan d’images --
Le traitement de l’image est indispensable dans notre secteur.

Tapioca a choisi de compléter son savoir-faire avec le concours d’un réalisateur et d’une équipe audiovisuelle.

Nous proposons des photographies, des captations, des teasers, des EPK. Tapioca peut également couvrir votre plan de communication avec la réalisation des outils nécessaires : pochettes d’album, affiches, newsletters et sites internet.

Name: Doctor Bird Productions Inc.
Description:
A new Canadian theatre company ready to take the performing arts world by storm.  In our inaugural year we will be taking on concert productions of Sweeney Todd and Candide! 
Doctor Bird Productions Inc. is committed to the practice of color-conscious casting. We recognize that considerations of race, including how race and ethnicity shape society and the stories we tell, are vital components to the casting process. Also critical to the casting process are audience perceptions of race on stage and in film. We strive to craft performances in ways that respect, care for, and honor individuals, cultures, and communities of color. Furthermore, we recognize that the practice of white-washing erases culturally and racially specific stories and experiences. White-washing takes away opportunities from people of color and reinforces the dangerous notion of white superiority. Therefore, we reject this practice. In light of this, we seek to be inclusive and color-conscious not only in our casting but also in the material we choose to stage.

There is always more to learn and more to do. As members of this community, we prioritize our continuous education, reflection, and action.

We are always committed to equity, diversity and inclusion. As such, we encourage performers of all races and ethnicities, gender identities, sexualities, abilities, and ages, as well as d/Deaf, to attend and submit to every audition.

Name: Inspired XI
Description:
DEDICATED TO WOMEN // Inspired XI is a service-oriented agency dedicated exclusively to women’s soccer. Based in Atlanta, USA, we have an extensive network in the women’s game throughout the United States and Europe.

THE POWER OF WOMEN’S SPORTS // At Inspired XI, we believe in the transformative power of women’s sports, not just for young women, but for people of all ages and genders. Witnessing the power, creativity and technical ability of women footballers today – and seeing them consistently celebrated and supported for these qualities – affects how people of all genders view women, as well as themselves, which has a positive impact on the whole of society.

This is what we are here for.

OUR MISSION // We seek to support the growth of the women’s game through [1] improved scouting and movement of players internationally – helping put the right players in the right places – and [2] supporting players and helping facilitate a good player-club relationship to make sure that all parties are successful and benefit from the relationship. While women’s soccer is growing, club budgets continue to be below the required levels, and we believe proactive and intentional supporting organizations, such as our own, are necessary for the women’s game to reach its potential.

It is our privilege and responsibility to serve. We are dedicated to service and enjoy serving both our clients and the clubs with whom they collaborate. Key to our mission is [1] ensuring that all players are respected and that their interests are put first, [2] educating young players (and coaches) so that more players have the information they need to make the right decision about playing professionally (or not), [3] facilitating more female coaches at the grass roots and professional levels and [4] supporting players no matter their sexual orientation.

Ефективний самозахист та самооборона для жінок. Самозахист у реальних ситуаціях - ліфт, під'їзд, декілька нападників...

* відчуєте впевненість у собі, ровините психологічну готовність

Також пропонуємо корпоративні семінари, онлайн консультації.

Чекаємо дзвінка від Вас.

* Система самозахисту для цивільних, яка включає як елементи військового рукопашного бою, так і самозахист з правовими обмеженнями для цивільних.

Name: ChoréACtif, association pour la création interdisciplinaire
Description:
L’association ChoréACtif conçoit et réalise des projets artistiques collaboratifs qui contribuent à la cohésion sociale et au développement personnel des citoyens. Ses intervenants élaborent des créations impliquant artistes et amateurs pour une aventure humaine et artistique singulière. Les projets s’appuient sur une démarche formalisée issue de la recherche en sciences sociales, elle permet d’embarquer et de valoriser chaque participant, artiste ou habitant grâce à la danse et l’image. L’association utilise le medium audio-visuel comme outil de collectage, création et médiation, dans des dispositifs valorisant chaque personne et son environnement, pour réaliser des films, documentaires ou spectacles chorégraphiques. 
	Basée à Clermont-Ferrand, elle intervient principalement sur les territoires du Puy de Dôme et de la région Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes auprès des collectivités territoriales et des acteurs culturels. Les bénéficiaires des projets sont généralement des jeunes et des publics éloignés de l’art et de la culture. 
Le projet a été initié, il y a 10 ans par Clotilde Amprimoz, réalisatrice, chorégraphe et cheffe de projets culturels, dans l’objectif de rendre accessible à tous l’art chorégraphique et plus largement le spectacle vivant et ses processus de création. À côté de ses films et créations en territoire, ChoréACtif propose des formations et master class en vidéo-danse ou création chorégraphique in situ, et réalise des contenus audio-visuels pour les acteurs culturels et plus particulièrement pour le secteur chorégraphique.

אתו"ס פרוסה ברחבי העיר חיפה, בעשרות מתקנים, במטרה לעודד פעילויות פנאי איכותיות, להיות חלק פעיל מחייהם של מאות אלפי תושבי חיפה והצפון ולהוות אבן שואבת לפעילויות תרבות וספורט לתושבי הצפון וישראל כולה, אם על ידי פיתוח והקמתן של תשתיות ומתקני תרבות וספורט ואם על ידי יציקת תוכן חי ודינמי לשגרת החיים של העיר חיפה.

טביעת האצבע של אתו"ס ניכרת בחיי התרבות והספורט מהכרמל ועד הים: פסטיבל הסרטים הבינלאומי, סינמטק חיפה, גן החיות ,התזמורת הסימפונית חיפה ותזמורת ביג בנד חיפה,  סדרת "מחול בחיפה",  שישרים , היכל הספורט "רוממה" , בית הספר למוסיקה עכשווית ומועדון ההופעות - Beat, הופעות, חוגים ופעילויות ועוד ועוד.

Name: Escuela de danza In Stage
Description:
Bienvenidos a In Stage 

Para nosotros, la danza es mucho más que técnica o pasos bien ejecutados: es una forma de expresarse, de divertirse, de trabajar la disciplina y también de crecer, tanto a nivel personal como en grupo. Queremos que cada persona que entre en nuestra escuela sienta que tiene un espacio donde moverse, aprender y disfrutar.

Para empresas
Diseñamos actividades de movimiento y danza pensadas para fortalecer equipos, despertar la creatividad y motivar. Desde masterclasses hasta programas de bienestar, cada experiencia se adapta a las necesidades de la empresa.

Niños y jóvenes
Ofrecemos programas de ballet y danza urbana que ayudan a ganar confianza, coordinación y creatividad desde pequeños. Acompañamos a cada alumno en su camino artístico con cercanía, constancia y mucha ilusión.

Adultos
Nunca es tarde para empezar a bailar (o volver a hacerlo). Tenemos clases de ballet, urbano y otros estilos para descubrir la danza, ponerse en forma y, sobre todo, pasarlo bien.

Variedad de estilos y niveles
Nuestra oferta va desde el ballet clásico hasta las danzas urbanas más actuales. Con grupos para todos los niveles y un equipo de profesores apasionados, cada clase se convierte en una oportunidad para aprender y disfrutar.

Momentos especiales
Creamos coreografías personalizadas para bodas y celebraciones. Desde la primera danza de una pareja hasta bailes en grupo con amigos o familiares, buscamos que cada ocasión se convierta en un recuerdo único.

Name: Plymouth Cheerleaders
Description:
Plymouth Cheerleaders is a performance-focused cheer dance organisation with a mission to make high-quality, meaningful performance opportunities accessible to all—regardless of background or financial circumstances.

We provide inclusive, affordable training for ages 4 through adult in a supportive environment that builds confidence, teamwork, and personal growth. We’re proud to offer performance opportunities with no added costs—no costume fees, performance fees, or rehearsal charges—ensuring every child has the chance to shine.

To keep this model sustainable, we run community fundraisers and receive invaluable support from generous sponsors and local businesses who believe in equal access to the arts.

Our structured class pathway includes:
• Elite Pro Adult Dance Team
• Academy Squad (13–17)
• Inters (11–13)
• Junior Cheer (8–11)
• Kids Cheer (4–7)

Our teams perform at annual showcases, community events, and professional sports fixtures—partnering with organisations like Plymouth Raiders Basketball Club and Plymouth Vanguard American Football.

Originally founded in 1987 as the Plymouth Raiders Cheerleaders, our team built a long-standing legacy performing at professional basketball games and community events across the city. In 2021, with a mission to do more for the community and create a pathway for athletes, the idea to become independent was put forward to the club owners at the time—who gave their full support. From there, Plymouth Cheerleaders was born, branching out from the Elite Team to become an organisation with its own inclusive development structure. Today, we continue to grow, championing accessibility, youth development, and the joy of performance through cheer dance across the South West.

Name: Canicross Fun Run
Description:
Canicross Fun Run is a unique and dynamic initiative in Romania that brings together sports, community, and social responsibility. Our mission is to inspire people to adopt an active lifestyle while strengthening the bond between humans and their dogs.

 We Run. We Change Minds. WOOF-WOOF Style.

Through our nationwide events, we:
 Promote physical activity and reduce sedentary lifestyles by engaging participants in fun and challenging races.
 Build an inclusive and vibrant community where people and their dogs experience teamwork and connection.
 Encourage empathy for animals and advocate for responsible pet ownership, adoption, and sterilization.

Our competitions include:
 Obstacle Run – A 2km race where human-dog teams navigate obstacles together.
 Speed Run – A 50m sprint designed for dogs of all sizes and abilities.

Canicross Fun Run is reshaping how people engage in outdoor activities with their dogs, reinforcing the importance of movement, connection, and social responsibility.

 Join us in making a difference – one race, one dog, one human at a time. 

#CanicrossFunRun #ActiveLifestyle #Community #DogSports #SocialImpact

Our mission is to transform raw potential into professional success by providing comprehensive management services to athletes across various disciplines, including football (soccer), basketball, and athletics.

Il veut sensibiliser les jeunes générations aux engrenages qui mènent au totalitarisme, aux extrémismes, et participer à l’apprentissage de la citoyenneté. 
Ce spectacle à vocation pédagogique et citoyenne est offert aux lycéens partout en France, et dans ses pays voisins.

Siamo affiliati anche all’Ente di Promozione A.C.S.I. (Associazione Centri Sportivi Italiani) riconosciuto dal CONI, nel quale ci muoviamo per le attività non strettamente agonistiche.

Description:
La Zafirina es la compañía creada por los dramaturgos Mafalda Bellido y Sergio Serrano en el año 2016 con el deseo de estrenar textos de autoría propia. Su trabajo parte de una minuciosa construcción de los textos y relatos y en la constante búsqueda de teatralidad y belleza encima del escenario.

Especializados en la dramaturgia contemporánea entre los dos autores han recibido numerosos reconocimientos como Finalista Premios Max Mejor Autoría Revelación, Premio de Teatro Internacional Ricardo López Aranda, Ganadores del Torneo de Dramaturgia Valenciana en 2017 y 2021, Premio Teatro Autor Exprés Fundación SGAE en 2017 y 2019, Finalistas Mejor Texto y Dirección Premis de les Arts Escèniques Valencianes y Premio de la Crítica Literaria Valenciana en 2023, entre otros; Han participado en diversos laboratorios de dramaturgia como el Laboratorio de escritura teatral de la Fundación Sgae, el laboratorio de dramaturgia “En blanco” Sala Cuarta Pared, la Beca de dramaturgia Sala Ultramar, el Laboratorio Ínsula Dramataria del IVC en 2016 y 2022 o el XI Programa de Desarrollo de Dramaturgias Actuales del INAEM, entre otros.

Name: Faeiron Acrobatics
Description:
We are a performance team specializing in high pole acrobatic lion dance. Our shows combine technical difficulty, creative choreography, and tight musicality to deliver a modern, high-impact experience for community events, grand openings, and weddings.

Alongside our pole shows, we also perform floor-based lion dance, which emphasizes performing arts and storytelling. On the floor, the lion becomes a character that can act out stories, emotions, and scenes — creating space for any community to share their story through this unique art form.

Founded in 2025 and based in Lincoln, Nebraska, we train year-round to push standards in both floor and high-pole formats.




We offer:
High pole performances that fuse cultural blessing with an unforgettable spectacle.

Weddings filled with culture and acrobatic taste, perfect start to your lifelong journey

Gender reveals with suprising bold color, energize for the unforgettable big moment.

Free Monthly memberships for those looking to train in lion dance, fitness, or acrobatics.

Coaching programs for all levels — whether you're just starting or ready to perform.

From fear came fire. From iron came flight.
Join us — and take your story to the sky.

Visit us at: https://www.faeironacrobatics.com

El TEM es algo más que un teatro, se ha convertido en un centro cultural al servicio del barrio y de sus asociaciones, un laboratorio de escena que también ofrece talleres y actividades participativas. El Teatre El Musical quiere ser un motor cultural para el Cabanyal y toda València, con una programación de primerísimo nivel donde caben todas las artes escénicas: teatro y música, conferencias y performances, exposiciones y espectáculos infantiles, circo y danza… Un espacio cultural para todas las personas en un Cabanyal para todas y para todos.

Name: Collegiate Dynasty
Description:
Collegiate Dynasty is a different type of trading card company. Our unique college sports trading card game (TCG) combines a clean, elegant look with a fast and straightforward game design to appeal to a wide audience: college sports fans, sports card hobbyists, TCG collectors, and especially, kids with college aspirations. We partner with schools, community-based organizations, and youth sports programs in communities historically excluded from higher education to use games as a way to build college awareness in younger kids and facilitate their college aspirations. Fifty percent of our revenue goes straight to our student athletes, whose compelling stories are introduced to a whole new audience through the Collegiate Dynasty game. We support our student athletes as they build their personal brands and advocate for their value. And we don’t stop there. We know that college students know what it’s like to be at the top of their game, so instead of asking them to “wait their turn,” Collegiate Dynasty is a company that commits itself to creating meaningful opportunities for college students and recent grads to shine professionally–this includes both our student athletes and our employees and interns. At Collegiate Dynasty, we are all about taking the shot. 

Welcome to the Game... Go Build Your Dynasty!

Name: CID Accademia Danza e Spettacolo
Description:
CID Accademia Danza e Spettacolo è da sempre il punto di riferimento a Parma per quanto riguarda la Danza e la Formazione Professionale di giovani danzatori.

Con il numeroso staff composto da insegnanti di fama nazionale ed internazionale ed una struttura con una superficie complessiva di 1200 mq suddivisi in 5 sale di cui una di 330 mq, CID Accademia Danza e Spettacolo si classifica tra le più grandi ed importanti scuole di danza sul territorio nazionale.

L’impegno di CID Accademia Danza e Spettacolo è volto alla formazione artistica e professionale di quegli allievi che sognano ed hanno l’obiettivo di intraprendere la carriera professionale.

La filosofia della scuola è quella di fornire una formazione artistica a 360°.

Infatti non solo è specializzata nei corsi professionali di Danza Classica, Danza Moderna e Contemporanea ma anche nell’insegnamento di Hip Hop, Broadway Jazz, Musical, Tip Tap, Break Dance, Balli Latino Americani, Boogie Woogie, Balli di Coppia e Danze Etniche.

All’interno della scuola sono presenti inoltre numerosi corsi di Fitness e Arti Marziali quali Pilates, Dance Fitness, Karate, Kick Boxing e Aikido.

Vincitrice di importanti concorsi legati alla danza e con numerose affermazioni in gare agonistiche e sportive, CID Accademia Danza e Spettacolo rivolge i suoi corsi a bambini e adulti di tutte le età.

CID Accademia Danza e Spettacolo inoltre è una delle pochissime realtà che all’interno della propria struttura vanta una sala spettacolo di dimensioni importanti, dotata di palcoscenico, quinte, luci di scena e impianto audio professionale, microfoni e platea con gradinata.

Name: Fight For PEACE
Description:
Le Fight for Peace est un événement unique qui transcende la boxe pour devenir un symbole de paix et d’unité. Organisé au Burkina Faso, ce gala réunit les meilleurs talents locaux et internationaux pour offrir un spectacle sportif mémorable, tout en portant un message fort dans un contexte de défis sociaux et sécuritaires.

Plus qu’un simple gala, le Fight for Peace célèbre les valeurs de solidarité, de dépassement de soi et de résilience. Les spectateurs auront l’occasion de découvrir des combats spectaculaires, avec des boxeurs comme Mathias "Le Fighter", tout en participant à une expérience immersive : animations interactives, stands partenaires, photobooths, et spectacles culturels.

Cet événement rassemble amateurs de sport, familles, jeunes et entreprises pour promouvoir la paix et soutenir les talents locaux. Le Fight for Peace prouve que le sport peut être une force motrice de changement et un vecteur d’espoir pour tous. Rejoignez-nous pour vivre une célébration inoubliable

Name: Na Djinang Circus
Description:
Na Djinang Circus is a Melbourne-based contemporary circus company that works with diverse young artists to share unique insights with the next generation's Hands & Feet. Founded by Wakka Wakka man Harley Mann, Na Djinang Circus aims to develop work that utilises the next generation's social and political attitudes and tells stories that challenge our own perceived ideas about contemporary Australian society.

Their work explores fundamental human characteristics from an Indigenous perspective, using the body to demonstrate complex human experiences of trust, connection, vulnerability, and joy. As a First Nations-led company, Na Djinang Circus's art and ethos reflect traditional and contemporary values. They are curious, original, and unafraid to make mistakes.

Na Djinang Circus believes that artists have the power to shape audiences' opinions and create change. Their work is thought-provoking and inspiring, encouraging audiences to challenge their assumptions and think critically about the world around them. With a commitment to diversity and inclusion, Na Djinang Circus is helping to create a more just and equitable society through their art.

Desde 2012, llevamos participando en diversas producciones audiovisuales, teatrales y televisivas. Fabricamos con delicadeza cada una de nuestras piezas para que la acción sea lo más impactante posible.

Gracias a nuestra mezcla especial de resinas y plásticos, conseguimos una apariencia brillante y colorida. Poco a poco, vamos realizando nuevos diseños de objetos listos para ser destruidos por las actores y especialistas de cine.

Nuestros clientes confían en nosotros para sus producciones e intentamos realizar el mejor producto con las mejores calidades. Disponemos de estudio propio donde realizamos nuestros moldes y piezas.

EVERY DOLLY MAKES A DIFFERENCE
For every Dance Dolly sold, we donate $10 to Dancers Against Cancer (DAC), a nonprofit that supports dancers and their families when cancer strikes. Name: Fall Celtic Festival
Description:
ABOUT:  The Fall Celtic Festival is a growing Annual Two-day Celebration of the Cultures of Ireland, Scotland, Wales, Cornwall, Brittany and the Isle of Man. Begun in 2018, the event brings Celtic Traditions and Fun to All the People of the Greater Toronto Area and invites them to explore a new culture or connect with their Celtic heritage.

LOCATION:  The Festival is held outdoors on the grounds of the Toronto Rock Athletic Centre, 1132 Invicta Drive, Oakville, Ontario L6H 6G1. Oakville is located roughly halfway between two of Ontario’s major cities, Toronto and Hamilton (about 32-38 km/20-23 miles either way), and about an hour's drive from the U.S. border crossings at Lewiston, Niagara Falls, or Buffalo, New York.

DATES:  Saturday, September 27th and Sunday, September 28th, 2025

TIMES: 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. Daily

ADMISSION:  Free

TICKETS: To Help Us Keep Track of Growing Attendance Numbers, Optional Free Reserved Tickets are Available for Each Festival Date at Eventbrite: https://bit.ly/4k6WfWc

DETAILS: For More Information and the Latest Updates on This Year’s Schedule of Performances and Attractions, Please Visit the Festival’s Website at: http://www.fallcelticfestival.ca

CONTACT:  Email fallcelticfestival@gmail.com

THE FALL CELTIC FESTIVAL FEATURES:
* Live Celtic Music performed by local Bands, Orchestras, Singers, and Choirs
* Irish, Highland, and Folk Dancers
* Live Celtic Theatre
* Exhibition Matches of Celtic Sports
* Exhibits showcasing Traditional and Modern Celtic Culture through Arts, Crafts, Food, Beverages, Travel, Languages, Storytelling, Folklore, History, Genealogy, and More!
* Celtic-Themed Demonstrations, Workshops, and Immersive Play and Learning Experiences that Bring Celtic Culture to Life for Kids and Families
* Kid Zone with Bouncy Castle
* Barbeque Food Tent
* Beer Tent and Inflatable Pub
* Vendor Stalls Selling edible Treats, beautiful Craftwork, Souvenirs, and Other Intriguing Items
* Wheelchair Accessible
* Gender-Neutral Washrooms

Name: Utah Cultural Alliance
Description:
ABOUT US:
Love for arts and culture is core to UT’s DNA. This business of living expands, deepens, heals, and transforms. As culture’s industry association, we’re like the UDOT of culture, we build the roads that bring the arts to all Utahns yielding:
 
-stronger communities, 
-a more creative workforce, 
-And improved brain development, creative problem solving skills, and character improvement for kids.
 
Founded in 1980, UCA has particularly changed the landscape for arts, museums, humanities, STEAM, design, film, and entertainment in the last five years. We create a friendly policy, funding, business, and educational environment in which creatives best transform lives. 
 
Our programs include NowPlayingUtah.com, economic data, an annual conference, a podcast, and our core work, lobbying on behalf of the industry. Together, this coordinated work brings cultural education and programming to every Utahn in order to benefit them, their families, their communities, and their employers.
 
UCA represents over 650 cultural businesses who employ 1 in 12 Utahns, supply 9% of the state’s GDP, attract 13% of Utah’s tourists, and generates $309M in direct tax revenue. Industry associations have a singular place at the political table. Thus our work has: 
 
-Increased public funding for nonprofit culture by 687%
-Grown K-12 STEAM educational funding by $15M
-Secured $40M in industry-saving emergency COVID relief
-Passed dozens of bills that protect consumers and cultural businesses alike
-Increased ticket purchases through nowplayingutah.com by 2,707% 
-Invested $150,000 in economic data

Iniciado como bienal, pasa en 2019 a ser anual, y busca reunir por espacio de una semana, una selección de las mejores agrupaciones y compañías del mundo, con énfasis en Iberoamérica. Su primera edición se realizó en julio de 2004. Su principal objetivo es contribuir a mejorar la calidad del teatro y la danza contemporánea nacionales, dos de las disciplinas relativamente menos desarrolladas en términos estéticos y artísticos en el medio panameño al momento de la creación del festival, poniendo a sus cultores en contacto con espectáculos, métodos de trabajo y búsquedas de prestigiosas agrupaciones internacionales, al tiempo que estimula la creación de públicos mejor informados y compenetrados, que ayuden a sustentar y garantizar la continuidad y desarrollo de estas manifestaciones escénicas.

This is The Last Match.
