La Polisportiva Tevere nasce nel 1968 come C.S.I Tevere Nuoto, modificatasi nel 1995 in Polisportiva Tevere ASD, dalla volontà di educatori e professionisti dello sport di mettere a disposizione della comunità la loro esperienza e professionalità, per fornire servizi di pratica, promozione e diffusione delle discipline e delle attività sportive e di valorizzazione dello sport come strumento formativo, educativo, culturale e sociale.

L’Associazione ha ricevuto importanti riconoscimenti dal mondo sportivo ufficiale insignita della Stella al Merito del CONI.

Dal 1 ottobre 1998, la Polisportiva Tevere opera nel quartiere Portuense, diventando un punto di riferimento centrale, non solo legato all’attività motoria, ma anche dal punto di vista sociale, come dimostrato dal numero di utenti sempre crescente e dalla valenza sociale dal punto di vista territoriale.

La nostra esperienza ci ha portato a credere che i bambini che si approcciano allo sport vanno seguiti nella delicata fase della crescita insegnando loro che lo sport è prima gioco, divertimento, ma anche rispetto delle regole.

Whether you're organizing a full-scale tournament or simply playing a friendly match, CrickBro makes scoring faster, smarter, and more engaging. The platform offers ball-by-ball commentary, instant match updates, comprehensive player and team analytics, and easy match setup—all accessible directly from your mobile device.

Beyond scoring, CrickBro also offers value-added features such as player hiring and ground booking, helping users manage every aspect of local cricket with ease and efficiency.

Our mission is to digitize and elevate local cricket by providing a reliable, intuitive, and scalable solution that enhances the game experience for everyone—from weekend players to tournament organizers.

CrickBro is proudly serving the cricket community across India.

Name: Festival Danza Estate
Description:
FDE – Festival Danza Estate, attualmente curato dalla cooperativa sociale 23/C Art, nasce nel 1989 e da più di trent’anni è il festival di Bergamo dedicato alla danza contemporanea. Intorno a questo progetto si è costruita e sviluppata nel tempo una rete di collaborazioni con numerosi partner culturali della città che ha favorito la sua crescita in costante ascolto del territorio. Nel corso degli anni FDE ha trasformato le sue traiettorie conservando alcune peculiarità e obiettivi: la sua forma diffusa, l’internazionalità delle presenze artistiche, la promozione e il sostegno degli artisti e delle artiste emergenti e la sensibilizzazione del pubblico verso i diversi linguaggi della danza contemporanea.

Il Festival desidera ampliare sempre di più la sua comunità accompagnandola alla scoperta e all’esperienza della danza attraverso numerose proposte: incontri, performance, proiezioni cinematografiche, iniziative di formazione. Questo percorso di avvicinamento e sensibilizzazione è pensato in modo trasversale in un’ottica che sostiene il dialogo tra i linguaggi del contemporaneo e la danza come possibile attivatore e collante di comunità proponendo azioni concrete rivolte a un pubblico eterogeneo e multigenerazionale.

Il costante incontro con il territorio e le comunità locali contribuisce alla costruzione di una proposta artistica che mette al centro il linguaggio della danza che con le sue contaminazioni desidera donare nuovi punti di vista e portare  benessere e bellezza a chi vive il Festival. 


FDE – Festival Danza Estate è sostenuto dal Ministero della Cultura, da Regione Lombardia e dal Comune di Bergamo attraverso un’intesa culturale volta a sostenere le attività di valorizzazione della danza contemporanea.

Med stor entusiasme omfavnede hun muligheden og opdagede hurtigt den spænding og glæde, det bragte med sig. Dette åbnede døren for hendes aktive deltagelse i løb og konkurrencer. Med en bemærkelsesværdig evne avancerede Lærke hurtigt til toppen af racerbanen og har siden da holdt en fremtrædende position i begivenheder som DRMC.

Name: RefPal Network
Description:
RefPal is the most innovative video analysis tool for referees to improve their performances and for refereeing departments to develop their referees.

RefWorld is a module that involves close to 500 international referees and heads of refereeing departments into the active learning process. 

We help You learn!

Description: JSM Sports Entertainment Inc. is a private investment and holding company focused on owning, operating, and investing in the sports and entertainment sector.

Name: Nationwide Arena
Description:
Nationwide Arena is the home of the National Hockey League's Columbus Blue Jackets and a wide variety of world-class entertainment events.

Located in the heart of Columbus, Nationwide Arena is the centerpiece of the downtown Arena District featuring an exciting mixture of restaurants, business, entertainment, and residential space that attracts visitors from across the country.

Name: Opéra de Massy
Description: Seul opéra en grande couronne de Paris, l'opéra de Massy fêtera ses 30 ans en Octobre 2023

Name: Nebraska School Activities Association
Description:
The Nebraska School Activities Association is a voluntary 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization that administers the statewide high school activities program for high school students in Nebraska.

The NSAA has been in existence and serving the youth of Nebraska since 1910 and currently sanctions 20 sports and five activities for its 307 member schools. The NSAA offers students opportunities for involvement, participation and healthy competition, while fostering overall mental, physical and social development.

NSAA Mission Statement
The public and non-public high schools of Nebraska voluntarily agreed to form the Nebraska School Activities Association for the following purposes:

•	To formulate and make policies which will cultivate high ideals of citizenship, fair competition, sportsmanship and teamwork which will complement the member schools curriculum programs;
•	To foster uniformity of standards in interscholastic activity competition;
•	To organize, develop, direct and regulate an interscholastic activity program which is equitable and will protect and promote the health and physical welfare of all participants.

Name: Arvore Cultural
Description: Nascemos para inovar, trazer soluções, gerar relacionamentos, valorizar parcerias, fortalecer marcas através da arte em ações diferenciadas para grandes, médias e pequenas empresas. Gerenciar carreiras artísticas, criar negócios com a arte e a cultura, manifestar ideias e realizar sonhos transformando-os em negócios sustentáveis. Através de parceiros unimos arte e esporte, moda e gastronomia. Desenvolver, elaborar e formatar projetos incentivados e trazer soluções para empresas e artistas utilizando tais recursos com inteligência e ousadia. Navegue pelo nosso site e conheça nossas realizações.

Name: Hobbeeme.com
Description:
Hobbeeme | Explore. Engage. Evolve.

At Hobbeeme, we believe that pursuing a hobby isn't just a pastime—it's a path to purpose, creativity, and personal growth. Based in the vibrant city of Dubai, Hobbeeme is the UAE’s first curated aggregator platform for hobby and leisure experiences across fitness, art, dance, music, languages, DIY, wellness, and beyond.

Our platform connects individuals of all ages with top-rated instructors, academies, and creative spaces, making it easier than ever to discover new passions, build skills, and connect with a like-minded community. Whether you're a curious beginner or a seasoned enthusiast, there’s something for everyone—online or in-person.

 For Individuals: Explore and book verified classes across a wide range of interests.
 For Vendors: Reach a wider audience through our seamless onboarding and promotional support.
 For Corporates: Unlock employee happiness with custom-curated team building, wellness, and CSR experiences.

With the bee as our symbol, we’re all about exploration, perseverance, and building a buzzing community of lifelong learners.

 Learn more: https://www.hobbeeme.com/
 Partner with us: info@hobbeeme.com

Name: Fundamental Improv
Description:
Fun Da Mental Improv is a community created with the vision of helping improvisers find their tribe. We want to help people understand the ethos of improv, through channelling the fun aspect of their personality, and allowing them to be authentically themselves.

We want to make improv "Fun Da!". :)

Name: Centro Flamenco de Sevilla
Description:
Centro cultural flamenco a los pies de la Giralda, en el centro de Sevilla.
Tablao flamenco. Actuaciones. Eventos. Representaciones.

Name: Stowarzyszenie Brzostek Top Team
Description:
Brzostek Top Team reprezentują ludzie których pasją jest walka. Walczymy o marzenia zarówno swoje jak i młodych sportowców. Od wielu lat czynnie angażujemy się w aktywizacje młodych ludzi zarówno w zakresie szerzenia patriotycznych postaw, angażowania młodych zdolnych ludzi w sport jak i zarażanie pasja do polskiego dziedzictwa kulturowego.

Jesteśmy tam gdzie potrzebują nas najbardziej. Nasz cel to wygrane marzenia. Nasza droga to ciężka praca i człowiek. W przyszłości, dzięki doświadczeniu i wiedzy, chcemy wygrać dla naszych podopiecznych lepszy start a co za tym idzie lepsze życie.  BTT powstała, dzięki długotrwałej inicjatywie grupy ludzi z różnych środowisk. 

W zespole mamy ekspertów z dziedziny sportów walki (wieloletnich trenerów oraz promotorów), marketingu i promocji oraz realizatorów działań z zakresu aktywności poza formalnej dzieci i młodzieży.

Name: Tourcoing Jazz
Description: Tourcoing Jazz est géré par l'Association Culturelle Tourquennoise qui organise et produit le Tourcoing Jazz Festival, le Tourcoing Jazz Club, le Tourcoing Jazz Event et le Tourcoing Jazz Tour avec le soutien de la Ville de Tourcoing, du Conseil Régional Hauts de France, du Conseil départemental du Nord et de la Métropole Européenne de Lille, de mécènes et partenaires entreprise.

Name: Les Productions Label LN
Description:
Société créée en 1991, Les Productions LABEL LN sont spécialisées dans la production et l'organisation de spectacles dans le Grand Est de la France.

De Nancy à Metz, de Strasbourg à Troyes et du Luxembourg à Dijon, les Productions Label LN proposent plus de 300 rendez-vous chaque année pour découvrir le meilleur des spectacles et concerts dans les plus grandes salles.

Variété française et internationale, comédie musicale, humour, théâtre ou spectacle pour enfants... Une large palette d'événements s'offre au public parmi les plus grands artistes en tournée.

Notre structure assure également ses services liés à l'organisation de nos événements :
- Gestion de billetterie
- Service communication, presse, médiaplanning : couverture médiatique assurée
- Affichage et diffusion
- Conseil artistique et programmation

Nous sommes à votre écoute pour toute question liée à notre programmation et nous pouvons également vous accompagner dans vos projets événementiels en vous mettant à disposition notre savoir faire.

Name: Scotiabank Centre
Description:
Scotiabank Centre is the largest multipurpose facility in Atlantic Canada and the hub for major events in Nova Scotia. We serve as the region's premier venue for sports and entertainment. Our facility is proudly home to the Halifax Mooseheads, the Royal Nova Scotia International Tattoo, and the Halifax Thunderbirds.

With a seating capacity of over 10,500, we're fully accessible to persons with disabilities, fully air-conditioned and include 47 Skyboxes, Premium Seating Lounges and Executive Suites.

Name: Iron District MKE

Name: JANA Producciones
Description:
JANA Producciones es una compañía que se ha consolidado como referente obligado en la producción de eventos musicales y espectáculos para todos los públicos. Ha obtenido, desde su fundación en el año 2000, grandes éxitos de público, crítica y el reconocimiento de los más prestigiosos certámenes artísticos. 43 Premios Nacionales avalan su trayectoria. 

JANA también es una escuela de Artes Escénicas y Teatro Musical con presencia en España, México, Ecuador y EEUU y con más de 2.500 alumnos.

Name: Waco Independent Film Festival
Description: The Waco Independent Film Festival (formerly Deep in the Heart) specializes in screening films that move, films that thrill, and films that make you feel! There's long been an interest in filmmaking and great films in central Texas. Waco is also a seedbed of artistic talent and a home for working artists, including media professionals and filmmakers. Many of today's industry leaders came from the Waco area and Baylor's Film and Digital Media Program.

Name: Para Standing Tennis
Description:
Para-Standing Tennis is for people with physical disabilities who play without using a wheelchair.
The sport is supported by the ITF and national governing bodies, with over 400 players from 34 different countries. Our goal is to become a certified Paralympic sport by 2028.

Name: Freedom Sports & Entertainment- FSE
Description: Founded by professional soccer and sports outbound ticket sales pioneer, Mark Washo, Freedom Sports and Entertainment (FSE) is a Sports and Entertainment Agency specializing in revenue generation for the sports and entertainment industry. Services include but are not limited to; Capital raise, fan owner campaigns, outsourced professional sponsorship and ticket sales revenue generation, ticket operations, sponsor activation, strategic sales and marketing plan development, plus overall sports management and business development.  We also provide ticket sales training services and recruiting/executive search.  We work with both an outsourced sales model, plus a sales management and mentorship model supporting in house sales teams.  The agency is currently offering "on demand" services for sports organizations with limited resources and budgets.  FSE can also help company's seeking to do business with sports organizations generate new relationships in the industry.

Name: Chafadou Productions
Description:
Chafadou Productions reconnaît et valorise les talents: nos équipes travaillent pour une évolution d'elles-mêmes et de la jeune société. Reconnue par ses pairs dès sa première année d'exploitation, Chafadou Productions conceptualise et diffuse des spectacles vivants sur le territoire français. 

Travail asynchrone, adaptabilité, perspective d'évolution due à une forte croissance sont au cœur de l'environnement de travail. L'agilité de l'équipe fluidifie les relations et permet un cadre de collaboration confortable.

Name: Rage Tour Booking Agency
Description:
RAGE TOUR, c’est plus de 25 années d’expérience, dont plus de 17 ans sous forme de SARL. Une structure fondée par Séverine Delahaye et Nicolas Giraudet, autour du groupe Tagada Jones à l’origine, conçue de ce fait par des musiciens, pour les musiciens.
Une société dont les valeurs sont basées sur la convivialité, le respect, le professionnalisme, la passion. Le tout complété par un solide esprit de famille. Plus que de simples valeurs, Rage Tour s’inscrit dans des actions concrètes pour développer les engagements sociétaux et environnementaux de l’entreprise.
Et le succès est au rendez-vous, reflété par un chiffre d’affaire en constante augmentation d’année en année. Avant de développer plus intensivement le pôle booking, la société a aussi beaucoup oeuvré en terme de production phonographique sous l’entité Enrage Production. Le label compte aujourd’hui plus de 70 références au catalogue et continue de fonctionner même si l’activité de spectacle a rapidement pris la place n°1 au sein de l'entreprise.
La SARL Enrage Corporation a plus d’une corde à son arc et développe en parallèle des activités secondaires : merchandising, édition, production et accompagnement de projets musicaux, location de véhicules de tournée, production de concerts et de festivals (On n'a plus 20 ans, Les Feux De L'été), mais aussi des collaborations actives avec d’autres festivals en tant que programmateur.
Issu à l’origine d’une niche musicale punk, metal et hardcore, Rage Tour Booking Agency tend aujourd’hui à se diversifier en élargissant son univers avec des styles de plus en plus variés
(rock français, hip hop, latino rock, etc...). Sa collaboration étroite avec de nombreux
tourneurs Européens confère à la structure une réelle valeur internationale.
Fort de nombreuses années d’expérience, et proposant un catalogue de plus de 200 groupes français
et internationaux, Rage Tour est aujourd’hui devenu un incontournable dans le paysage des tourneurs français.

Name: JBL Sonorisation
Description: Entreprise dédié à la location et la prestation pour les événements d'entreprises, Nous disposons d'un important parc de matériel technique pour vos événements. Matériel Vidéo, Sonorisation, Eclairage et structure.

Name: Baltic Esports Association
Description:
The Baltic Esports Association (BEA) is dedicated to building a professional, sustainable, and thriving esports ecosystem across the Baltic region. We believe esports is more than just a game - it's a movement and a rapidly growing industry.

Our mission is to provide the platform, infrastructure, and support necessary for players, teams, and industry leaders to excel and grow.

Name: Next on the Tee

Next on the Tee brings you inside the ropes with golf legends, top instructors, and industry insiders.
 Real stories. Expert insights. Legendary conversations.
Follow us—where golf legends live and your game gets better.

Name: KFC Yum! Center
Description:
The KFC Yum! Center, located in Louisville, KY, is one of the nation's premiere entertainment venues. The 22,000 seat arena is the official home of the NCAA Division I University of Louisville men’s and women’s basketball programs and host to more than 100 events annually including top grossing concerts, family shows and other touring acts.

Aside from being a great concert and sporting event venue, the arena also has breathtaking spaces to rent for large or intimate private events varying from weddings to luncheons. For more information on how to schedule an event at the facility visit www.kfcyumcenter.com.

Name: Théâtre Le Grand Bleu
Description:
Un théâtre pour les enfants, les adolescents, les jeunes d’aujourd’hui qui feront le monde de demain.

Créé en 1981 et implanté à Lille dans le quartier des Bois-Blancs, Le Grand Bleu est un établissement culturel, une association qui propose une programmation artistique pluridisciplinaire émancipatrice destinée plus particulièrement aux nouvelles générations (de la toute petite enfance à l’adulte naissant) et aux familles.

Aujourd’hui Scène Conventionnée d’Intérêt National « Art, Enfance et Jeunesse », Le Grand Bleu est un pôle de référence de la création jeune public dans la Métropole Européenne de Lille, la Région des Hauts-de-France et sur l’ensemble du territoire national.

Parmi ses missions et au-delà de la programmation, Le Grand Bleu propose de nombreux parcours d’éducation artistique et culturelle dans et hors les murs (parcours de spectateurs, labos de pratique artistique, projets de forme participatives, matinées créatives à partager en famille, spectacles décentralisés…)

Le Grand Bleu est un théâtre ouvert et partagé, accessible à tous les publics. Un terrain d’aventure, un lieu de fabrique, un espace convivial propice à la rencontre des artistes, des nouvelles générations, des passeurs d’arts que sont les médiateurs, enseignants, animateurs, éducateurs, professionnels de l’enfance et parents.

Name: Plus Seven Company
Description: Plus Seven Company (P7c) delivers winning sports and entertainment. Through its properties and services divisions, P7c’s expertise covers events, branding, partnerships, public relations and tourism advisory.

Name: The College Cuber
Description:
I use cube & brick art to create life-sized mosaics of professional athletes, logos, and more for sports organizations across the world.

I offer commissioned art pieces, live performances, custom videos, and more.

Name: Festival Les Egaluantes
Description:
Le festival du cinéma normand à Carentan-les-Marais,  4500 festivaliers en 2022
 Projections - rencontres - animations
 23 au 26 novembre 2023

Culturellement par la vitalité et la régularité des personnalités qu’il a offertes au cinéma.

Le festival Les Egaluantes met à l'honneur tous les films, séries, documentaires ayant un lien avec la Normandie.

Avec une rencontre 0 paillettes et 100% convivialité, les Egaluantes est sont devenus un rendez-vous incontournable dans le Cotentin depuis 2016.

Claude Lelouch, Michel Laroque, Orelsan ou encore Grégoire Ludig, de nombreux noms du cinéma se sont rendus à Carentan les derniers week-end de novembre fin de présenter leurs films et parler du lien entre la Normandie et le 7ème art !

Name: Bodies.pt
Description:
A MAIOR EXPOSIÇÃO SOBRE O CORPO HUMANO

A nossa Expo é perfeita para todas as idades educativas e tem como objetivo revelar os segredos da anatomia humana através de uma viagem pedagógica sobre o que a pele realmente esconde. 

De perto, iremos mostrar, como nunca antes, o funcionamento da máquina mais perfeita alguma vez criada: o Corpo Humano. 

8 CORPOS REAIS, mais de 100 órgãos e múltiplos audiovisuais num espaço de 1.000m2.

Uma exposição de grande interesse cultural e científico. Órgãos reais que foram "cuidadosamente preservados" por plastinação (um processo tecnológico de preservação de materiais biológicos).

Junte-se aos milhões de pessoas de todas as idades que já visitaram Bodies em todo o mundo e desfrute desta exposição inspiradora que mudará para sempre o seu conceito de si próprio, a experiência da vida e a importância de cuidar do seu corpo.

Mais de 30 milhões de visitantes em todo o mundo. Agora em digressão em Portugal!

Name: Kids Artistic Revue
Description:
Welcome to Kids Artistic Revue National Dance Competition! In 2022 we celebrated our 40th anniversary of proudly serving the dance community. KAR has continued to thrive because of our amazing dancers, teachers, and parents honoring us with the distinction of “America’s Favorite Dance Competition!” This inspires our entire team to work diligently to provide the best customer service while continuing to be an industry leader and produce world class dance events year after year.

KAR, along with our family of brands including Rainbow and Ultra Dance Competition, is dedicated to recognizing and encouraging dancers from across the world. Our beautiful stages will be shared by thousands of performers who will all have their moment to shine in a positive, rewarding, and exhilarating setting. We are proud to recognize teachers, choreographers, and parents for their hard work and commitment as they assist dancers to achieve their goals. KAR is honored to be a positive outlet where dedication, talent, and accomplishments are proudly celebrated.

KAR is more than a dance competition. Our unique environment affords the opportunity to showcase the mental and physical discipline that it takes to be a dancer, while promoting the extraordinary confidence it takes to be a performer. With over 80 Regional competitions and 6 National Finals, our team is ready to inspire dancers and create lifelong memories. Let’s build the dancers of tomorrow, today.

Name: RAIMAT ARTS FESTIVAL

Description:
Pyxis, Maison de la culture et de l'exploration numérique !
Un tout nouveau nid créatif déployant sa programmation autour d’un pôle d’exploration numérique, un café culturel ouvert sur le quartier, des lieux d’accueil pour faire rayonner les initiatives citoyennes, un centre de ressources pour la scène artistique locale, des espaces de travail pour six entités culturelles lausannoises.

Description: Depuis plus de 20 ans, Bars en Trans s'emploie à dénicher les groupes français dont on parlera demain. Rendez-vous du 5 au 7 décembre 2024 !

Name: Midwest Gaming Classic
Description: The Midwest Gaming Classic is an annual trade show open to the general public celebrating all forms of gaming, including video games, arcade games, pinball, TTRPG, Tabletop board games, trading and collectible card games with a focus on retrogaming.

Name: Outpoint Group
Description: Outpoint Group is an independent consultancy firm that empowers professionals with hands-on, immersive tours designed to expand knowledge and inspire growth. Our tours are tailored to each client's specific needs and objectives, and provide unparalleled access to leading industry infrastructure and experts. Contact us to start planning your next business tour and take the first step towards professional learning and knowledge exploration.

Name: Musical Marseille
Description: Musical est une association marseillaise qui créée des spectacles collectifs pluridisciplinaires autour d’un compositeur de musique classique, mêlant musiques actuelles, cirque, danse, expression théâtrale et musique classique. Musical implique les forces vives locales dans la conception du spectacle. Sur scène d'abord, en proposant aux structures culturelles de terrain, aux jeunes de tous quartiers et aux institutions du territoire de monter sur scène et travailler à la réalisation du spectacle. En coulisses également, en proposant aux établissements d’enseignement professionnel et associations de terrain de réaliser les éléments de mise en scène du spectacle (costumes, coiffures, maquillage, décor, vidéo-projection…).  Enfin, elle propose de sensibiliser  les enfants et publics éloignés à la culture au travers d'actions éducatiuves en partenariat avec les acteurs du territoire.

Name: Kulturhus Trefkoele+ in Dalfsen
Description:
Kulturhus Trefkoele+ is voor tal van mogelijkheden geschikt. Of u nu een congres wilt organiseren, een symposium, een (theater)voorstelling of een (bedrijfs)training, u kunt bij ons terecht voor een geschikte accommodatie.
Dankzij onze multifunctionele zalen zijn wij in staat om uw deelnemers een geheel verzorgde dag te bezorgen tegen een uitstekende prijs-kwaliteit verhouding. Maar we hebben veel meer te bieden. Wat denkt u van een familiesportdag,  bedrijfstoernooi of  kinderfeestje in ons PlusCafé? Wij zorgen voor een geslaagde dag. Of wilt u gewoon eens komen lunchen? Ook dat is bij ons mogelijk in het PlusCafé.

Daarnaast kunt u natuurlijk gewoon bij één van onze partners binnenlopen en genieten van al het moois dat zij te bieden hebben. Wat dacht u van een bezoekje aan de Historische Kring Dalfsen, een kaartje leggen of meedoen met bingo bij Saam Welzijn? Of rustig een krantje lezen aan de leestafel van de bibliotheek? Ook dit is allemaal mogelijk.

Name: ASDEPORTE OFICIAL
Description:
Asdeporte es la comunidad de deportistas de habla hispana más importante del mundo y el organizador de eventos deportivos más importante de México.

Con más de 1 millón de usuarios registrados, en Asdeporte activamos a más de 90,000 atletas cada año y más de 100,000 horas deportivas de eventos deportivos, incluyendo carrera, natación, ciclismo y triatlón. Un ejemplo es el triatlón internacional de Veracruz, el más grande de América Latina con una espectacular transición de 3200 bicicletas.

Asdeporte genera más de 13,000 empleos indirectos cada año, para ayudar al éxito de cientos de eventos deportivos en los que participan en promedio cerca de 6,000 competidores cada vez.

Entre nuestros principales destinos están Los Cabos, La Paz, Ixtapa-Zihuatanejo, Huatulco, Acapulco, Mérida, Cozumel, Veracruz, Monterrey, San Cristóbal de las Casas, Valle de Bravo y equesquitengo, por mencionar algunos. Asdeporte mueve a más de 54,000 competidores, con lo que podría llenar más de 250 charters cada año.

Name: MISTER FREEZE
Description: MISTER FREEZE est un collectif dʼartistes d'horizons différents (peintres, graffeurs, photographes, illustrateurs, graphistes...). Profondément passionnés et impliqués, nos membres multiplient les interventions artistiques auprès du grand public (expositions, ateliers, conférences, performances, fresques murales) pour mieux former les jeunes talents, initier petits et grands et plus largement, rendre lʼART accessible à toutes et à tous.

Name: Pannahouse
Description:
At the heart of Pannahouse lies a vision to create a global movement that champions physical and mental health, cultural understanding, and robust communities. Founded on the streets of Copenhagen, Pannahouse has grown from a grassroots movement into an international beacon for panna enthusiasts. 

We have three core pillars: Athletic Engagement and Development | Digital Outreach and Cultural Proliferation | Community Empowerment and Personal Growth. We provide trainings, tournaments and shows while having a focus on creative training methods, availability through online presence, networking, leadership and mentor roles in street culture.Some of our projects include:

𝐖𝐨𝐫𝐥𝐝 𝐏𝐚𝐧𝐧𝐚 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐦𝐩𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐩𝐬: An annual spectacle showcasing the world's best talent, uniting 45+ countries and reaching over 40 million people since 2016. A pivotal event for our organisation that strengthens local intercultural connections and inspires the world. Spanning four days, it features tournaments in groundmoves, panna, and 3v3, alongside various social events, fostering cultural exchange, skill development and passion in a festival atmosphere of creativity, diversity, and social interaction. 

𝐏𝐀𝐍𝐍𝐀 𝐃𝐊: Currently building and fundraising for a national expansion effort aiming to weave panna culture into the fabric of Danish society in the form physical local hubs and a digital platform fostering active lifestyles. It is the first structural step towards a sustainable and scalable ecosystem that builds on Pannahouse's successful bottom-up approach with panna in Copenhagen. 

𝐁𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐁𝐮𝐢𝐥𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠: Developing a sustainable brand to ensure the longevity and vibrancy of urban culture and its practitioners. We produce streetwear and street football products. 

𝐑𝐨𝐥𝐞𝐦𝐨𝐝𝐞𝐥𝐬 𝐨𝐟 𝐓𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐫𝐨𝐰: Cultivating influencers and ambassadors who personify core values of urban culture, thereby inspiring future generations.

Name: Millennial Events
Description:
Bridging authentic street culture with mainstream opportunity across Asia-Pacific

Millennial Events operates as cultural translators in the action sports landscape, with strategic presence in Singapore, Shanghai, Indonesia, and Tokyo. We specialise in skateboarding, BMX, and parkour—creating experiences that serve both competitive development and community building.

What we do:

We run the MASS competition series, Asia's premier all-ages, all-skill-levels skateboarding platform, drawing participants from 13 countries. These aren't just contests—they're cultural anchors giving communities ownership of public spaces.

We've delivered mega events like Uprising Tokyo (featuring Yuto Horigome and global pros) and managed the Vans Park Series across Asia, but our strength lies in understanding that authentic culture can't be manufactured through corporate activations.

Recent work:

- "Find Your Folks @ Jalan Besar" with Singapore Design Council during Singapore Design Week
- Coaching development programmes with Sport Singapore and World Skate
- Avenue & Son Grand Masters in China
- Skatepark consulting across the region

Our approach:

We match development strategies to existing community resources rather than forcing traditional frameworks onto street culture. Whether it's government agencies seeking authentic youth engagement, brands connecting with next-generation audiences, or NGOs building international programmes, we help organisations navigate the difference between genuine culture and manufactured marketing.

Our media platform @mass_apac reaches 30K+ followers with 1.61M+ monthly impressions, providing market intelligence that challenges conventional wisdom about where engagement actually lives in Asian action sports.

Authentic culture grows through genuine infrastructure and participation—not top-down corporate strategy. We help you get there.

Name: Monaco Water Games
Description:
Le Monaco Water Games est l'événement de l'été à ne pas manquer ! 

Pendant trois jours, du 12 au 14 juillet, découvrez une expérience unique sur un terrain flottant où les seules limites sont l’eau.
Pour la première fois sur la Principauté de Monaco, des matchs de rugby auront lieu sur l’eau. Cet événement exceptionnel constitue une opportunité unique de découvrir et d'explorer les mondes passionnants de ce sport.

Les Monaco Water Games offriront trois journées exceptionnelles : une journée dédiée aux écoles de rugby le 12 juillet, suivie de deux journées consacrées au rugby les 13 et 14 juillet. Pour clôturer en beauté, un match de prestige aura lieu : le match des légendes mettant en scène les stars du rugby le 14 juillet.  Ces événements prestigieux réuniront un public d'exception, comprenant des légendes du rugby, les joueurs du XV de France, des influenceurs et des sportifs monégasques.

Name: ADSD uOttawa
Description:
L’Association du droit des sports et du divertissement vise, au niveau sportif, à démontrer les nombreux aspects légaux dans les différents sports comme les contrats, les marques déposées, l’administration athlétique, le droit du travail sportif et la propriété personnelle des athlètes et des artistes. En ce qui concerne le divertissement, l’Association vise à démontrer l’établissement légal derrière l’organisation et l’enjeu des événements et festivals sportifs, musicaux et autres. De plus, nous croyons qu’il est important de faire découvrir aux futurs professionnels que la pratique de droit n’est pas exclusif au cabinet, elle peut aussi se faire au sein de contentieux comme les entreprises sportives ou de divertissement et que cette forme de pratique peut être aussi intéressante que la pratique en cabinet privé.

______

The Sports and Entertainment Law Association aims, at the sports level, to demonstrate the many legal aspects in the various sports such as contracts, trademarks, athletic administration, sports labor law and the personal property of athletes and artists. As for entertainment, the Association aims to demonstrate the legal establishment behind the organization and stakes of sporting, musical and other events and festivals. In addition, we believe it is important to introduce future professionals to the fact that the practice of law is not exclusive to the law firm, it can also be done within litigation such as sports or entertainment companies, and that this form of practice can be just as interesting as private practice.

Name: Nuestra Jam
Description:
Nuestra Jam es una experiencia que fusiona la música en vivo creada en tiempo real, la danza, el arte visual y el arte plástico.
Es un lugar de encuentro, un espacio para manifestarse y socializar, es un momento para bailar, y disfrutar con amigos de una noche diferente.

Nuestra Jam mixtura artistas profesionales con principiantes; se entrelazan distintas maneras de hacer arte en un marco inclusivo y de constante experimentación.
Es un evento pensado para el disfrute tanto de los intérpretes como del público que concurre.
La premisa es que sea una fiesta; compartir esa energía tan potente que se vive en cada fecha. Creamos comunidad.

El eje de Nuestra Jam está atravesado por la música en vivo guiada mediante el lenguaje de Ritmo con Señas ideado
por Santiago Vázquez; el mismo lenguaje utilizado por La Bomba de Tiempo, La Grande, Pan Percusión, Cuerpo y otras compañías.

Más de 80 músicos comparten el escenario cada fecha. Son guiados por reconocidos directores del mundo del Ritmo con señas.
La percusión como elemento principal es acompañada por secciones de vientos, guitarras, bajo, sintetizadores, beatboxers, freestlylers y cantantes.

Los ritmos que surgen son tan amplios como hipnóticos. El producto sonoro combinado con el formato “de pie” invita
al movimiento en el público.

INCLUIMOS EL ARTE EN TODAS SUS FORMAS
Danza: Se suman al juego bailarines de todos los estilos que dibujan con sus cuerpos lo que la música les transmite.
Micro shows: Artistas invitados nos permiten descubrir el talento emergente y ampliar el universo musical de Nuestra Jam.
Arte plástico y visuales: Artistas plásticos crean obras mientras suena la música y mediante pantallas se proyectan visuales que enriquecen la experiencia.

La puesta en escena es la de un Show profesional
con toda la técnica necesaria tanto en sonido como
en luces que potencian los diferentes momentos
que se van gestando.
Todo está pensado para que Nuestra Jam sea
disfrutar tanto arriba como abajo del escenario.

Name: Youth Breaking Championships LLC
Description:
Youth Breaking Championships (YBC) is the first national competition circuit developed to empower youth through the art and sport of breaking. In partnership with the Amateur Athletic Union (AAU), YBC created the first structured national breaking league system with skill-based divisions, local league events, regional qualifiers, and a direct pathway to the AAU Junior Olympic Games.

Founded on the values of community, education, and opportunity, YBC bridges the gap between street culture and organized sport. The platform includes a conference with workshops, health & wellness seminars, and peer mentorship, helping develop well-rounded young athletes. By combining cultural authenticity with competitive structure, YBC is shaping the future of breaking as a recognized youth sport and Olympic discipline.

La Pole art academy nasce nel 2017 dopo un confronto con colei che diventerà il perno importante dell'academy, Angela Lepore.
Con sedi a Bari, Valenzano e Matera la Pole art academy ha divulgato le discipline aeree ( Cerchio aereo, Pole Dance e Tessuti ) su tutto il territorio diventando una dell'academy più grandi del sud Italia per numero di iscritti.

Name: 21 Minutes Art Battle Championship
Description:
‘21 Minutes’ is an evert held every two months(currently) which is a competition for upcoming and established artists to showcase their skills and challenge themselves to produce a piece of art within 21 minutes. The theme for each round is chosen by asking the audience.
There are four head-to-head rounds before two semifinals and final. There is cash prize and a trophy for the winner, as well as runner-up prizes.

We endeavour to produce a ‘roster’ of artists with a record, mini docs and interviews which all go to the YouTube channel so consumers can relate to the different competitors of 21 minutes.

The event begins around 6pm with the show finishing between 10-11pm. There are 15 minute intervals between each round.

We also showcase new DJs and MCs who wish to take part, with an open mic policy.

Currently the brand is being built with website and social media under construction, as well as you tube channel.(we’ve hired professional film editors to film and help edit the footage in line with the brand.

Revenue streams include merchandise and social media, with the possibility of tickets sales in future.

Sponsorship includes- ‘People Captain’- a brewery with a ethos of promoting mental health.
‘Wild Style cafe’- a arts supply shop based in Clapham.
We are looking to grow sponsorship as the business grows.

Description:
Kolektyw Artystyczny, działający na rzecz rozwoju kulturalnego wśród studentów Uniwersytetu Warszawskiego. Naszym celem jest stwarzanie możliwości do poznania kultury i sztuki we wszystkich ich dziedzinach. Chcemy tworzyć miejsce dla młodych artystów, poszukujących przestrzeni do komfortowej ekspresji.

Wszyscy są u Nas mile widziani! Jeżeli chcesz rozpocząć swoją przygodę ze sztuką, albo musiałeś ją przerwać i chciałbyś do niej powrócić - gorąco zapraszamy do dołączenia do naszego grona. Zapraszamy także tych, którzy chcą na moment oderwać się od spraw przyziemnych i poprzebywać w twórczej atmosferze.

W planach mamy wydarzenia otwarte dla wszystkich, jak i skierowane do członków naszej organizacji. Nie chcemy się ograniczać do wybranych dyscyplin artystycznych - naszą misją jest wszechstronny rozwój.

It doesn’t matter what you are doing. Maybe you are composing, walking, or rushing down the highest mountain you have ever climbed with your bike, and your peripherals seem to fade. All you feel is alive, dedicated to striving, and completely in the flow. If you have an idea of what we mean, you are one of us! Here at Streckenrausch, we want to share and celebrate this Flow with you! Join us on the Streckenrausch.

Name: DLW-Creatief Ondernemer
Description:
Hét manusje-van-alles in de creatieve industrie - werkzaam in de Randstad, maar uiteraard ook daarbuiten! 

Welke diensten lever ik?

1. Ondersteuning Geluidstechniek/Leerlingbegeleiding muziekproducties:
——————————————————————————————————
Sinds 2021-2022 werk ik op freelance-basis als Assistent Geluidstechniek op het Vossius Gymnasium te Amsterdam. Gedurende de vele jaarlijkse muziekgerelateerde schoolevenementen ben ik de verbindende factor tussen de leerlingen die in de producties meedraaien en het Hoofd Geluidstechniek in dienst van de school. 


2. Allround DJ & Muziekcurator:
———————————————
Sinds 2010 draai ik als DJ, onder de artiestennaam 'Natte Haarie', op uiteenlopende soorten evenementen op diverse locaties. Ik draai zeer eclectisch: van oude Disco, Soul, Funk, Pop en Krautrock tot Afro, House, Techno, Rave en EBM; letterlijk alles kan de revue passeren in mijn altijd weer verrassende en veelzijdige sets.

Tevens ben ik sinds kort beschikbaar om voor uw organisatie 'muziek op maat' - 'music made to measure', zoals ik het zelf graag noem - te verzorgen. Laatstgenoemde gebeurt uiteraard in nauwe samenspraak en met een gedetailleerd oog voor het beoogde publiek als echte eindafnemer. Zo kan ik voor u bijvoorbeeld specifieke afspeellijsten samenstellen, afgestemd op elk moment van de dag en voor elke stemming/sfeer.

Voor boekingen (en overige muziekopdrachten), stuur een mail naar: natte_haarie_dj@outlook.com


3. Creatief Klusser & Restaurateur:
————————————————
Sinds najaar 2021 ben ik mij meer en meer gaan storten op zowel oud- als nieuwbouw; in de toekomst hoop ik daar nog verbouw aan toe te kunnen voegen. 

Bij oudbouw gaat het om bijvoorbeeld het "redden" van nationaal erfgoed, Rijksmonumenten en Beschermd Stads- en Dorpsgezicht. Dit alles vindt plaats door middel van restauratie/renovatie, waarbij zo veel mogelijk de oude gebruikte materialen en ornamenten worden hergebruikt en oude technieken (opnieuw) worden toegepast.

Description:

Our Mission: To design, program, and deploy production-grade autonomous driving algorithms. We function not just as a student team, but as a simulated constructor, treating every line of code like a race-critical component.

Current Campaign: We are the official representatives of Egypt and Africa in the international Bosch Future Mobility Challenge (BFMC), developing autonomy solutions on 1:10 scale platforms.

Core Competencies:
1. Computer Vision & Sensor Fusion
2. Path Planning & Control Systems
3. V2X Connectivity
4. Embedded Systems Architecture
5. Intelligence Takes Flight.

Name: Stichting Belle and The Beats
Description:
Through a combination of intoxicating sounds and a variety of instruments, the Amsterdam-based performance art act Belle and The Beats explores the spectrum of love and sexuality. ‘In our tracks, we are constantly seeking for new experiences – musically, obviously, but also emotionally.’ 

‘As a woman and musician, I want to dig into the broad spectrum of female sexuality and all that comes with it,’ Belle explains. ‘You see – women can exploit their femininity to get things done. At the same time, it is also their weakness. As Oscar Wilde once said: “Everything in this world is about sex, except sex. Sex is about power.” It’s this contrast that I try to explore, in both my private life and through songwriting.’

On stage, Belle’s goddess-like alter ego Qetesh comes to life, as a reference to the eponymous Egyptian goddess of sacred ecstasy and sexual pleasure. She appears through symbolic visuals and sensual movements, immediately captivating the audience. Influenced by strong performers such as Lana Del Rey, Leonard Cohen, and Grace Jones, Belle dares to show all sides of her poetic yet provocative personality, as her tracks are wrapped in a layer of cross-cultural symbolism and femininity.

On 13 May 2022, Belle and The Beats released their debut album Qetesh.

Name: Dance Cloud
Description:
THE BIG IDEA

Dance Cloud is a new learning and performance platform that turns dance routines into amazing virtual reality productions - using a single mobile phone.


VALUE PROPOSITION

EDUCATION - Dance Cloud offers rewarding experiences that teach people new dance moves and help them to perfect their skills.

EMPOWERMENT - Dance Cloud offers a rich media experience that unlocks new forms of creative expression, and opportunities to monetise talent.

ENTERTAINMENT - Dance cloud offers a contemporary digital experience that is great fun to use, and wows audiences by making dancers’ routines look awesome.


KEY FEATURES

Learn new routines from a catalogue of different dance styles and tempos with Virtual Choreographers who provide real-time accuracy feedback.

Capture dance moves with a single mobile phone, then recreate them with a Digital Twin (personalised avatar) in a cinema quality Virtual Reality scene.

Select music, create virtual environments, set lighting levels, trigger special effects and choose dynamic camera angles using the Dance Cloud VR Production Desk.

Share productions with friends, colleagues and casting agents directly from a personally-curated Dance Cloud Portfolio.

Monetise creativity by adding dance routines to our catalogue for others to learn.


SUMMARY

Dance Cloud is great fun whether used by amateur or professional dancers. It is a powerful creative production tool that educates, empowers and entertains. 

And is the only learn, create and publish platform that turns performance art into Virtual Reality productions ‘and’ allows contributors to monetise their talent and creativity by using our software to turn their Digital Twin into a Virtual Choreographer - so others can learn their routines too.


FUTURE

We're planning a ‘live broadcast mode’ that dancers can use to perform and monetise their routines, at Street Dance XR locations in the Real World Metaverse, and within private Materverse ecosystems.

Name: MyEvents Indonesia
Description:
MyEventsIDN, also known as My Events Indonesia, is a professional exhibition and conference organizer and promoter specializing in sports and entertainment events. The company was founded by Justinus Lhaksana (Coach Justin), Tio Nugroho, Niken Ayu, and Fauzan Zaman. 

Notable past events organized by MyEventsIDN include:
1. Pepe Arbeloa & Friends Entertainment Match at GBK Stadium, Senayan, Jakarta (2011);

2. Fabregas & Friends Entertainment Match at GBK Stadium, Senayan, Jakarta (2011);

3. European Legend vs Persib Legend at Jalak Harupat Stadium, Bandung (2012); and

4. Valencia CF Indonesia Tour at GBK Main Stadium, Senayan, Jakarta (2012).

In addition to these four events, MyEventsIDN also pitched proposals for several other events that could not be held due to technical issues, including:
1. FC Barcelona Indonesia Tour 2013: An agreement was reached, but the event was canceled due to scheduling conflicts during the Eid holiday; and

2. Chelsea FC Indonesia Tour 2013: Initial preparations were made, but the event was taken over by 9Sports in collaboration with BNI46 and RCTI due to funding issues.

Following the Valencia CF Tour, the company was put on hold by Tio Nugroho, the Director of Finance, through his unilateral decision, which was later agreed upon by the other three founders.

Name: Creatives Makhado
Description:
A digital platform dedicated to discovering talented artists, uplifting up-coming artists and giving them a chance to showcase their talents to a bigger audience. Creatives Makhado is currently the Top leading platform for creatives in South Africa, no other organization is doing what we are doing for the culture. From musicians, models, djs, dancers, actors, photographers, visual artists and other types of creative collaborations, we are empowering more creatives and in the process we are growing our movement. 

Our platform is FREE, and it has always been free since 2014. It was designed and created to help artists get their work to a bigger audience for Free. It's an online place where we showcase artist's work & share their stories to inspire others, and through the platform artists can connect with each other. Our platform hits an average of 90k - 120k visitors per month, each article reaches over 10k visitors and some even more than 50k, Hundreds of artists have seen improvements in their brand image since they started getting featured on Creatives Makhado. The platform is the future, the more we grow the more impact we have on shining a spotlight on local artists.

Actually, Creatives Makhado is more than just platform, IT'S A MOVEMENT, A CULTURE, A RELIGION, A SYSTEM, more like THE NEW WAY. We are activists, standing up and fighting for local creatives. We are the light and the only future of local creatives. We are the only Organization in South Africa that puts creatives first, we do more than just illustrating the works of young urban talent, we also partner with event organizers across the country to promote these artists even more further. Creatives Makhado also hosts it's own Art and Music workshops, where we bring in motivational speakers to empower budding artists on the challenges of bringing their creative business to life. We hosting high school tours, women empowerment events and digital competitions etc. WE ARE FUN, COLORFUL, LOUD & CREATIVE !

Description:
Zurkhaneh is a martial arts strength conditioning system used by knights and warriors from a bygone era and by contemporary and current Olympic and World champion wrestlers.
Recognized by UNESCO as the world's oldest running form of such training, Persian Yoga is a complete integrated form of exercise that uses tools like the Sang (Shields), Shena (Push-up Boards), Meel (Persian Mace Clubs), and Kabbadeh (Steel Bow) to provide increased resistance and neurological input during circular multi-planar movements to deliver a fluid, incredibly demanding, yet a simple and approachable practice that will make you stronger and more pain-free than ever before. Live drums and epic poetry are performed during the event.

Description:
Ming Yun Sports & Culture takes its name from Crown Prince Zhang Huai of the Tang Dynasty — a statesman and patron of the arts whose love of polo symbolised the harmony between intellect, sport, and culture. Inspired by this legacy, Ming Yun is dedicated to advancing modern polo and equestrian culture through international exchange, education, and competition.


Founded in the United Kingdom and China, Ming Yun operates professional polo teams and cultural programmes across the UK, Argentina, and Xinjiang. The organisation builds bridges between heritage and innovation, integrating local horse traditions with global standards of sport, training, and cultural presentation.


Through its cross-continental work in equestrian training, cultural tourism, and youth development, Ming Yun promotes a new model of cultural confidence — one that connects China’s historical spirit of equestrian excellence with a global future.

Name: International Performing Arts Consortium
Description:
International Performing Arts Consortium (IPAC) is a global non-profit consortium dedicated to harnessing the power of dance, music, theater, and movement to inspire social change and foster intercultural dialogue. Our network unites theater creators, artists, educators, and cultural advocates who collaborate to celebrate diverse traditions and explore contemporary artistic expressions.

By focusing on international cultural exchange, artistic heritage and community engagement, we keep cultural expressions alive for future generations while empowering communities to share their stories. Our theater productions, performances, and residencies bring together artists from varied backgrounds to innovate, co-create, and deepen cross-cultural understanding. Through workshops and masterclasses, IPAC provides enriching educational programs that cultivate new skills, spark creativity, and broaden perspectives.

We also champion community outreach initiatives that document and revitalize endangered art forms with emerging technology, ensuring that intangible cultural heritage remains vibrant and accessible. Our impact extends to youth education and young artists where we nurture culturally aware, socially responsible future generations committed to unifying communities through the performing arts.

Join us in embracing the transformative power of collaboration. Whether you’re an artist, educator, patron, or volunteer, your involvement helps us build bridges and create lasting impact across borders. Explore our global festivals, collaborative performances, and cultural preservation projects to see how you can be part of our mission to inspire empathy and strengthen solidarity.

Visit our website for more information and upcoming performances and follow us here on LinkedIn for the latest news, events, and success stories. Together, we can uphold the rich tapestry of our world’s artistic heritage.

Description:
Indie Box's work revolves around the performing arts, with contemporary dance and music created live through voice, beatboxing, looping and field recording as its main levers. With a keen interest in ways of occupying public space, mental health and social perceptions of madness, and the complexities of parenting, Indie Box has evolved organically over the last 6 years. Starting from a sound mapping project of Bucharest, going through research and cultural intervention experiences in public space, constantly testing different lecture formats and exploring the relationships between body, voice and space, Indie Box has gradually moved towards the production of performances, films and performative exhibitions. 

Currently, Indie Box's portfolio includes performances and concerts created by artists Alexandra Bălășoiu, Denis Bolborea, Valentina de Piante, Ana Cristina Leonte and the vocal group Blue Noise, intended for both conventional and public spaces, as well as a dance film that was born from a collective process of artists Alexandra Bălășoiu, Virginia Negru, Cătălin Diaconu, Denis Bolborea, in dialogue with director and cinematographer Gabriel Durlan. 

The productions were presented in Bucharest, Budapest, Buzău, Brașov, Câmpina, Cluj, Iași, Ploiești, Sfântu Gheorghe, Sibiu, Suceava, Timișoara. In 2020, Indie Box launched blip.indiebox.ro, an online platform that supports the visibility of beatboxing and live-looping, and since 2021 promotes dance as a means of transformation and knowledge through the digital project Danstopic.
Currently, Indie Box constantly organizes workshops and performances in psychiatric hospitals in collaboration with dance therapist Loredana Larionescu, supports artistic creative residencies for mother-artists and their children within [m]others and opens the processes to the general public in various workshop formats.

Name: Mixed Nuts
Description:
Mixed Nuts is an international English improvisational comedy group based in Warsaw, bringing together passionate performers from across the world to create smart, spontaneous, and unforgettable live comedy experiences. Founded in 2022, we combine diverse cultural perspectives with sharp comedic instincts to deliver performances that feel fresh, dynamic, and deeply engaging for modern audiences.

Our work spans high energy short form games and immersive long form storytelling, all rooted in the core principles of improvisation collaboration, creativity, and presence in the moment. Every performance is entirely unscripted, ensuring that no two shows are ever the same and that audiences are always part of something uniquely alive and original.

Beyond the stage, Mixed Nuts is committed to strengthening the improv community through regular improv jams, workshops, and collaborative events. We actively participate in charity fundraisers and cultural initiatives, using comedy as a powerful tool to connect people, break down cultural barriers, and create shared moments of joy. Our group has proudly performed at recognized improv festivals including PIK 2024 and 2025 in Warsaw and Das Improv 2025 in Berlin.

Mixed Nuts also collaborates with organizations, event planners, conferences, and creative communities to deliver engaging entertainment, interactive workshops, team building sessions, and performance based experiences that inspire confidence, communication, and creative thinking. With a growing international following, we continue to shape a vibrant space for English language improv comedy in Poland and beyond.

For collaborations, bookings, or event partnerships, please contact us via direct message or email at mixednutsimprov@gmail.com
.

Name: Território de Contato
Description:
Território de Contato é uma agência de produção, conteúdo e consultoria fundada por Luiza Morandini, profissional com mais de 16 anos de experiência na área cultural, atuando em curadoria, produção, gestão, planejamento estratégico e comunicação, no Brasil e na Europa. Luiza desenvolve e gerencia projetos culturais focados em inclusão, arte e impacto social.

Entre os eventos que coordenou ou curou estão o FAM Festival (São Paulo, Salvador, Rio de Janeiro, Recife), Vila Jazz e festas juninas em shoppings. Tem experiência em projetos multidisciplinares, socioculturais e educativos, com ampla rede de contatos nos setores público e privado.

Residiu dois anos e meio em Londres, onde foi Arts & Culture Officer na Canning House e curadora da série Jungle at Camino. Trabalhou como especialista em sustentabilidade no Instituto EDP, assessora cultural no Consulado de Israel em São Paulo e integrou equipes de curadoria como a da JNF Produções, coordenando cerca de 60 shows mensais.

Como produtora e curadora independente, realizou pesquisas para a empresa britânica Sound Diplomacy e foi curadora musical do Mercado Manual (2015-2019). Atuou no British Council em programas musicais e participou de festivais importantes, como Europalia.Brasil, Festival Path e JazzAhead. Foi membro de comissões de seleção e jurada em eventos culturais e, desde 2004, coordena projetos culturais com foco em impacto social.

Name: Las Horas del Humo
Description:

Las Horas del Humo apuesta por el cuidado de cada detalle, la atención e investigación sobre todos los lenguajes escénicos, una (auto)exigencia rigurosa y un amor compartido por el teatro. Por otro lado Las horas del humo basa su trabajo en la concepción del teatro como arte efímero (de ahí viene su nombre) y político. Entre sus líneas de investigación están el paso del tiempo, el género y la identidad.

La compañía cuenta además con una visión ética
y política del trabajo teatral, que pretende construir formas de organización basadas en la horizontalidad, la cooperación y el feminismo poniendo como horizonte la creación colectiva, la generosidad y la creatividad al servicio de la escena.

Il nome Zen viene scelto perchè come lo Zen appunto, l'associazione vuole essere una scuola di vita.
Le discipline come il Ju-Jitsu, il Parkour e via dicendo, nell'idea dello Zen club sono degli strumenti per arrivare all'Uomo, alla sua integrità psicofisica, al miglioramento che permette di stare meglio con noi stessi e con gli altri.
L'attività non si limita alla sola pratica sportiva ma contempla un notevole lavoro nel campo dell'aggregazione sociale.
Essere iscritti allo Zen club significa molto più che frequentare una palestra, molto più che fare sport.
Chi ha vissuto e vive l'esperienza di questo ambiente non lo potrà mai dimenticare.
Provare...per credere!

Name: LauraEnÓrbita
Description:
LauraEnÓrbita produce y aúna el trabajo que Laura Suárez lleva desarrollando desde hace más de 20 años en su faceta de directora, actriz y pedagoga teatral, concibiendo las artes escénicas como un espacio interdisciplinar e inclusivo. Este espacio ha permitido la creación de diversas compañías, entre ellas, Vertebradas Artes Escénicas.

La compañía Vertebradas Artes Escénicas surge del Taller de Teatro Inclusivo Permanente convocado y dirigido por Laura Suárez desde 2015 con el interés de profundizar en su método del teatro de la experiencia, experimentando en técnicas de actuación y en la creación colectiva. Abiertas a un lenguaje escénico donde se exploran las
capacidades expresivas, la diversidad se ofrece como una oportunidad para el enriquecimiento.

Piedra angular de los valores de la compañía, la igualdad y la inclusión acompañan todas sus producciones en las distintas áreas profesionales. La calidad creativa y escénica de dichas producciones es un reflejo de la diversidad del grupo y del beneficio de lo diferente.

Actualmente LauraEnÓrbita tiene tres obras de teatro inclusivas en gira: 
Junto con Vertebradas Artes Escénicas:
- 'Diversas Mujeres', sobre la visibilidad de la mujer;
- 'Molinos a mí!', un viaje a lo desconocido de la mano del Quijote; 
y con La Pájara Pinta Ensemble: 
- 'Cántame un cuento', sobre la vida y obra de Maria Elena Walsh. 

En 2023 se estrenarán dos nuevas piezas, que actualmente están en proceso de creación: '43°6′11″N 0°59′10″E', un instalación sonora, plástica, dramática y
visual, junto con la compañía Bocas de Caracola, formada por Laura Suárez, Ersilia Prosperi y Marilena Muratori. 
Vertebradas Artes Escénicas también trabaja en su nuevo proyecto. 

Además de las obras, Laura Suárez sigue trabajando como pedagoga teatral, facilitando talleres inclusivos y formaciones para profesionales en diferentes espacios.

Name: Ecoeclect
Description:
At Industry EcoEclect, we blend art, heritage, and innovation to create unique postcards and stickers inspired by iconic architecture. Founded in Paris and rooted in the artistic soul of Odessa, our brand captures the timeless elegance of historic doors—symbols of culture, craftsmanship, and memory.

Each of our designs tells a story. From the ornate facades of Paris to the sculptural beauty of Odessa, we transform architectural details into collectible art that resonates with nostalgia, curiosity, and refined aesthetics.

We believe architecture is a living testimony of the past—an emotional link between eras, places, and people. Our mission is to celebrate this connection by offering thoughtfully designed pieces that invite exploration and spark imagination.

Whether you're an art lover, a traveler, or a design enthusiast, our creations open a door to stories waiting to be rediscovered.

Name: Reign Sports and arts Academy
Description:
ReignSAA will be focused on being a Wellness, education, Arts, Sports, and Entertainment hub. Merging indigenous black culture, sports, food, and arts with the contemporary. Introducing culture back to our ever-evolving society. Witbank is a mining town and a cultural melting pot. So we choose to take all the best parts of our little city, beautiful country, our different cultures, and our Global citizenry and give it a place to blossom and help the community at the same time.


The founders & directors, Thandeka Hlatshwayo and Dimakatso Mashile have both deeply immersed themselves in the sports, arts, and wellness sectors in their education, their interests, and their talents. Having been one of Witbank's first black women to play Golf amongst the rich and rake up championships, Hlatshwayo has had the insight to open up these indigenously exclusive sports to the forefront and allow every person from any corner of life to part-take. Mashile is on a journey to being a psychologist and wants to bring mental wellness into the black community. What brings them together is the news to create sports and arts (music, writing screenplays, poetry, theater, etc) opportunities while empowering the community. 


Witbank is an area with a story. It simply got diluted and forgotten as the eras of time and technology went by. We want to tell the story of Witbank as it relates to the current industrial climate. Bringing back the light and fire of the town outside of coal and electricity allowing minorities to take up space in sports they were previously prohibited from taking part in and shining a light on the different sports South Africans Excel at. Tennis, Golf, Volleyball, Hockey, Soccer, and Netball. We are also bringing a world food experience with a restaurant that deliciously melts together South African and international cuisine. Black Thanksgiving dinner, Sunday Kos, braai, dim sum, street food, etc.

Name: COACHeD
Description:
### Experience the Evolution of Basketball: From Courts to Communities

#### Bringing Dreams to Life: A Journey of Passion

For any basketball player, there's no greater dream than giving back to the community, inspiring the youth, and sharing the love for the game. My basketball journey began 30 years ago on the courts of Bucharest. My PE teacher recognized my potential and encouraged me to pursue the sport seriously. This led me to a professional career as a junior player, and during high school, I discovered my true calling in streetball.

#### Coaching the Future: Nurturing Young Talent in the UK

After moving to the UK, I obtained my coaching license with the London Basketball Association (LBA). Since then, I've been dedicated to coaching the U12, U16, and U18 age groups. My coaching philosophy focuses on teaching fundamental basketball skills, allowing players to develop their unique styles and express their creativity on the court. I believe in providing realistic, constructive feedback to ensure accurate guidance and positive development.

#### A Concept Rooted in Creativity and Passion

My coaching concept goes beyond traditional methods. It embraces the imaginative power of kids, encouraging them to express themselves through basketball. This approach enhances their technical skills while nurturing their creativity and love for the game.

#### Promoting Streetball and 3x3 Olympic Discipline

Streetball, especially the 3x3 Olympic discipline, holds a special place in my heart. It represents a dynamic and exciting form of basketball that I promote through my coaching and community initiatives. By focusing on streetball, I aim to bring a fresh perspective to the sport and highlight its global significance.

#### Creating Inter-Sports Educational Opportunities

I also aspire to develop a program that creates inter-sports educational opportunities. This initiative will encourage kids to explore various sports, fostering a well-rounded athletic career

Name: Greenbelt SITY Stars Jump Rope Team
Description:
Established in 1991, the Greenbelt S.I.T.Y. Stars is a jump rope sports team that inspires kids to fitness.  S.I.T.Y. is an acronym for Sensational, Inspirational, Talented, Youth. It is the purpose of the Greenbelt S.I.T.Y. Stars to offer a quality jump rope program that not only develops technical jumping skills but also promotes fitness and teamwork, builds self esteem, develops confidence and leadership skills and encourages good sportsmanship while helping to promote the sport of Jump Rope.  

   GSS has been serving youth and building healthier lifestyles in Greenbelt and surrounding areas for 32 years by providing safe training in the sport of jump rope utilizing fitness training and performance arts -- music, dance techniques and tumbling.  GSS promotes social development, physical fitness and inspires healthy living and proper nutrition.  We specialize in teaching athletes how to perform and compete in the sport of jump rope while developing character, integrity, and leadership qualities.

    This program not only develops technical jumping skills, but also instills traits such as teamwork, self‐confidence and sportsmanship while helping to promote the sport of jump rope. Members of the team train three days per week preparing for demonstrations and competitions, working to perfect speed, endurance, technique, strength and freestyle skills.

O maior espetáculo no gelo da América Latina está chegando ao Brasil, e sua marca pode fazer parte dessa história.

A Nova Cinderela no Gelo é uma superprodução internacional que une Brasil e Portugal em uma releitura emocionante de um clássico atemporal.

Depois de encantar plateias na Europa, o espetáculo estreia no Brasil com uma mensagem inspiradora sobre coragem, diversidade e empoderamento, combinando música ao vivo, patinação artística e cenários imersivos.

Mais do que um espetáculo, é um movimento cultural com propósito, realizado sob certificação internacional ISO 20121 e alinhado aos Objetivos de Desenvolvimento Sustentável da ONU.

Em cada temporada, A Nova Cinderela no Gelo promove acessibilidade total, palestras em escolas públicas, oficinas de inclusão digital e educação financeira, além de ingressos sociais para grupos em situação de vulnerabilidade.

Com realização via Lei de Incentivo à Cultura, o projeto une excelência artística, impacto social e sustentabilidade em uma parceria inédita entre dois países que acreditam no poder da arte para transformar realidades.

Name: Legends Cup
Description:
La Legends Cup es un innovador torneo de fútbol 7 que se celebra en Chile. Combina deporte, espectáculo y cultura digital, siguiendo un formato similar a la Kings League española. La competición reúne a ocho equipos presididos por reconocidas personalidades, incluyendo influencers, ex futbolistas profesionales y referentes del mundo del deporte.

Entre las figuras confirmadas para participar se encuentran personalidades como Rantés Verdugo ("El Ranty"), Nicolás Escobar ("Nickten10"), Rodrigo "Gallina" Avilés, Tomás Melivilú, y la cantante Blue Mary. También destaca la participación del ex futbolista profesional Jaime Valdés como presidente del equipo Cac1ke.

El torneo cuenta con reglas especiales para hacerlo más entretenido. Por ejemplo, los partidos duran 40 minutos (20 por cada tiempo) y se juegan en la Ciudad Deportiva de la Universidad San Sebastián. Una característica única es que la modalidad de juego de los últimos dos minutos se elige mediante una votación en Instagram, integrando así a las redes sociales en la dinámica del juego.

La primera edición ya se completó, con Big Ballers como campeón, equipo que preside el reconocido influencer conocido como Makako. La segunda edición está programada para celebrarse entre mayo y julio de 2025.

Name: RAVEN Autosport
Description:
RAVEN (Robotic Autonomous Vehicle Engineering Network) Autosport is a specialized engineering team based at the German University in Cairo (GUC). We operate at the intersection of high-performance robotics and autonomous systems.

Our Mission: To design, program, and deploy production-grade autonomous driving algorithms. We function not just as a student team, but as a simulated constructor, treating every line of code like a race-critical component.

Current Campaign: We are the official representatives of Egypt and Africa in the international Bosch Future Mobility Challenge (BFMC), developing Level 4/5 autonomy solutions on 1:10 scale platforms.

Core Competencies:
1. Computer Vision & Sensor Fusion
2. Path Planning & Control Systems
3. V2X Connectivity
4. Embedded Systems Architecture
5. Intelligence Takes Flight.

Name: Associazione Culturale Be Street
Description:
L’ Associazione Culturale BE STREET HIP HOP SCHOOL ALBA & BRA presente sul territorio di Alba, Bra, Langa, Roero, Monferrato, Torinese e Savonese da anni ha come scopo la condivisione, la diffusione e la rivalutazione delle culture artistiche e sportive di strada che appartengono al mondo giovanile e che spesso vengono fraintese come modi sbagliati di vivere l’esigenza di esprimere se stessi in relazione con gli altri anche nel luogo d’incontro più comune di tutti LA STRADA.

Le 4 Discipline Artistiche della Cultura Hip Hop (Breakdance & Danza Hip Hop, Dj, Graffiti Art, Rap ), Skateboard e Radio ( in collaborazione con Radio Alba ), sono la fonte d'ispirazione che usiamo per creare laboratori Artistici e Sportivi, Eventi, Tour Turistici ideati dal nostro Team di Alba e Bra per comprendere l’importanza di unire, con un linguaggio moderno, storia e cultura cercando di riavvicinare i giovani allo straordinario patrimonio Unesco in mezzo al quale viviamo.

Crediamo fermamente che per avere un presente ed un futuro migliore i giovani devono creare nuove idee e progetti che siano al passo con le novità della scena nazionale e internazionale legate al mondo delle Culture di Strada come l' Hip Hop  Culture ma che non perdano il contatto con il luogo e la storia dove essi vivono. In questo modo si può creare forse un futuro ed un panorama sociale più allettante per i giovani del nostro territorio di ALBA e BRA diminuendo così l 'esodo di massa della maggior parte dei ragazzi subito dopo il Diploma della scuola Superiore. 



Il Team della nostra Associazione si avvale di Artisti e Pionieri della cultura Hip Hop e delle altre discipline di Strada attivi sulla scena Locale di Alba, Bra, provincia di Cuneo e Asti sia a livello Nazionale da più di 18 anni, inoltre si avvale di tecnici riconosciuti FIDS CONI per la Breakdance e FISR CONI per lo Skateboard essendo tutte e due discipline OLIMPICHE.

„Pohyb na vlastní tělo“

Name: STUDIO THEATRE OF BATH
Description: Studio Theatre of Bath is dedicated to enriching the community through live theatrical-based events.  Founded in part in 1979 by Priscilla & J. Pat Montgomery, STUDIO THEATRE OF BATH is one of mid-coast Maine's oldest active community theater groups. Since 1980 "STB" has produced upwards of 140 major theatrical productions of all ranges & styles and has been a constant for community enrichment in Bath, Maine for nearly 40 years. With emphasis on high quality, we pride ourselves in always putting our cast & crew in a position to succeed while never using "community theater" as an excuse.

Name: ÖY - The Flow Home
Description:
ÖY – The Flow Home is a small movement studio based in Glasgow’s Southside.
We offer pole hire, yoga, and high heels classes in an intimate, living-room style space designed to feel more like home than a gym.

Our mission is to create a safe and supportive environment where people can explore movement at their own pace, whether that’s building strength, releasing tension, or simply taking time for themselves.

With classes capped at just 5–6 people, ÖY provides the kind of personal attention and community connection that larger studios often miss. Every session is guided by experienced teachers who offer both modifications and progressions, ensuring that movement feels accessible to all levels.

 At ÖY, we believe movement is more than exercise; it’s a way to reconnect with yourself and find your home from within.

Name: Queen Of The Point
Description: Queen Of The Point (QOTP) aims to make longboard surfing accessible and positive for women of all ages through coaching, teaching, and competition. QOTP provides a safe environment to help female athletes achieve their dreams, promoting equity, integrity, and truth. The organization focuses on breaking down barriers and fostering a global community of women in surfing. It also aims to preserve the tradition of longboard surfing for future generations.

Name: Talent Solidaire
Description:
Talent Solidaire – Créons ensemble les champions de demain !

Talent Solidaire est une association dédiée au soutien des athlètes et artistes de niveau national à international, en facilitant leur accès aux ressources essentielles pour exceller dans leur discipline : sponsoring, financements, équipement, déplacements et visibilité.

Notre mission est double :
 Offrir aux entreprises une opportunité de partenariat et de sponsoring stratégique, en les associant à des talents qui incarnent performance, engagement et excellence.
 Créer un réseau dynamique de sponsors et de donateurs, favorisant des synergies entre les acteurs économiques et les talents que nous accompagnons.

 Pourquoi rejoindre notre réseau ?
 Associez votre entreprise aux valeurs du sport de haut niveau et de la performance artistique.
 Profitez d’une visibilité accrue à travers notre stratégie digitale et nos événements.
 Bénéficiez d’opportunités uniques de networking avec d’autres sponsors et partenaires.
 Engagez-vous dans une démarche RSE impactante en soutenant des talents qui incarnent le dépassement de soi et l’innovation.

Talent Solidaire déploie une stratégie digitale forte, notamment sur LinkedIn, afin d’assurer à ses partenaires une exposition optimale et de fédérer un réseau d’entreprises partageant les mêmes valeurs.

 Vous souhaitez devenir partenaire, sponsor ou en savoir plus ? Contactez-nous et participez à l’aventure Talent Solidaire !

#Sponsoring #Partenariat #SportBusiness #Entrepreneuriat #RSE #TalentSolidaire #Networking #Événementiel #HautNiveau #AthlètesInternationaux

Name: En un lugar del Tiempo
Description: Un espectáculo multidisciplinar que combina música, teatro y danza basadas en un guión totalmente original dando lugar a una función moderna e innovadora. El hilo conductor de toda la obra se basa en la investigación desarrollada sobre el célebre escritor . En ella se representa con especial cuidado y atención diferentes momentos de la vida de nuestro protagonista, Saramago, pasando por algunos de los momentos más importantes y conocidos de su vida. Además, durante todo el transcurso de este proyecto, se hacen guiños a sus obras escritas, no solo mediante la inspiración artística de las mismas, sino siendo algunos de sus títulos y poemas, representados, recitados y utilizados mediante el dialogo, ayudándonos así de sus palabras para contar su historia.
